revision.text:
'''壬戌'''（みずのえいぬ、じんじゅつ）は、[[干支]]の一つ。
[[甲子]]から数えて59番目で、前は[[辛酉]]、次は[[癸亥]]である。[[十干]]の[[五行思想|五行]]は水、[[十二支]]の五行は土で、[[五行思想#相剋|相剋]]（土剋水）である。
==壬戌の年==
==壬戌の日== ===[[選日]]=== 壬戌の日は[[八専]]の間日である。

revision.comment: Programmatically generating so that if this gets imported to wikipedia as a draft, the bot will attribute it to Immanuelle and send them g6 warnings

revision.text:
{{干支}} '''壬戌'''（みずのえいぬ、じんすいのいぬ、じんじゅつ）は、[[干支]]の一つ。
干支の組み合わせの59番目で、前は[[辛酉]]、次は[[癸亥]]である。[[陰陽五行思想|陰陽五行]]では、[[十干]]の[[壬]]は陽の[[水]]、[[十二支]]の[[戌]]は陽の[[土]]で、[[五行思想#相剋（そうこく）|相剋]]（土剋水）である。
==壬戌の年== [[西暦]]年を60で割って2が余る年が壬戌の[[年]]となる。 {| class="wikitable" |+'''壬戌の年''' |- ![[1千年紀]]!![[2千年紀]]!![[3千年紀]] |- | *[[2年]] *[[62年]] *[[122年]] *[[182年]] *[[242年]] *[[302年]] *[[362年]] *[[422年]] *[[482年]] *[[542年]] *[[602年]] *[[662年]] *[[722年]] *[[782年]] *[[842年]] *[[902年]] *[[962年]] | *[[1022年]] *[[1082年]] *[[1142年]] *[[1202年]] *[[1262年]] *[[1322年]] *[[1382年]] *[[1442年]] *[[1502年]] *[[1562年]] *[[1622年]] *[[1682年]] *[[1742年]] *[[1802年]] *[[1862年]] *[[1922年]] *[[1982年]] | *[[2042年]] *[[2102年]] *[[2162年]] *[[2222年]] *[[2282年]] *[[2342年]] *[[2402年]] *[[2462年]] *[[2522年]] *[[2582年]] *[[2642年]] *[[2702年]] *[[2762年]] *[[2822年]] *[[2882年]] *[[2942年]] |}
==壬戌の月== 西暦年の下1桁が3・8（十干が[[癸]]・[[戊]]）の年の[[9月]]が壬戌の[[月 (暦)|月]]となる。ただしここでいう月は、[[旧暦]]の月や[[節月]]（[[寒露]]から[[立冬]]の前日まで）を適用する場合もある。
==壬戌の日== ===選日=== 壬戌の日は[[八専]]の間日である。 ==関連項目== *{{prefix}} *{{intitle}} {{DEFAULTSORT:みすのえいぬ}} [[Category:Sexagenary cycle]] [[Category:New pages]] [[Category:pages needing attribution]][[Category:壬戌]][[Category:pages needing attribution]] [[Category:properly attributed pages]][[Category:壬戌]][[Category:properly attributed pages]] [[ja:壬戌]]

{{干支}} '''壬戌'''（みずのえいぬ、じんすいのいぬ、じんじゅつ）は、[[干支]]の一つ。
干支の組み合わせの59番目で、前は[[辛酉]]、次は[[癸亥]]である。[[陰陽五行思想|陰陽五行]]では、[[十干]]の[[壬]]は陽の[[水]]、[[十二支]]の[[戌]]は陽の[[土]]で、[[五行思想#相剋（そうこく）|相剋]]（土剋水）である。
==壬戌の年== [[西暦]]年を60で割って2が余る年が壬戌の[[年]]となる。 {| class="wikitable" |+'''壬戌の年''' |- ![[1千年紀]]!![[2千年紀]]!![[3千年紀]] |- | *[[2年]] *[[62年]] *[[122年]] *[[182年]] *[[242年]] *[[302年]] *[[362年]] *[[422年]] *[[482年]] *[[542年]] *[[602年]] *[[662年]] *[[722年]] *[[782年]] *[[842年]] *[[902年]] *[[962年]] | *[[1022年]] *[[1082年]] *[[1142年]] *[[1202年]] *[[1262年]] *[[1322年]] *[[1382年]] *[[1442年]] *[[1502年]] *[[1562年]] *[[1622年]] *[[1682年]] *[[1742年]] *[[1802年]] *[[1862年]] *[[1922年]] *[[1982年]] | *[[2042年]] *[[2102年]] *[[2162年]] *[[2222年]] *[[2282年]] *[[2342年]] *[[2402年]] *[[2462年]] *[[2522年]] *[[2582年]] *[[2642年]] *[[2702年]] *[[2762年]] *[[2822年]] *[[2882年]] *[[2942年]] |}
==壬戌の月== 西暦年の下1桁が3・8（十干が[[癸]]・[[戊]]）の年の[[9月]]が壬戌の[[月 (暦)|月]]となる。ただしここでいう月は、[[旧暦]]の月や[[節月]]（[[寒露]]から[[立冬]]の前日まで）を適用する場合もある。
==壬戌の日== ===選日=== 壬戌の日は[[八専]]の間日である。 ==関連項目== *{{prefix}} *{{intitle}} {{DEFAULTSORT:みすのえいぬ}} [[Category:Sexagenary cycle]] [[Category:Unsorted completion categories]] [[Category:壬戌]][[Category:properly attributed pages]][[Category:壬戌]][[Category:properly attributed pages]] [[Category:properly attributed pages]][[Category:壬戌]][[Category:properly attributed pages]] [[ja:壬戌]]

==壬戌の月== 西暦年の下1桁が3・8（十干が[[癸]]・[[戊]]）の年の[[9月]]が壬戌の[[月 (暦)|月]]となる。ただしここでいう月は、[[旧暦]]の月や[[節月]]（[[寒露]]から[[立冬]]の前日まで）を適用する場合もある。
==壬戌の日== ===選日=== 壬戌の日は[[八専]]の間日である。 ==関連項目== *{{prefix}} *{{intitle}} {{citation needed|みすのえいぬ}} [[Category:Sexagenary cycle members]] [[Category:Unsorted completion categories]] [[Category:qq---qq]] [[Category:qq-Yang Water Dog-qq]] [[Category:壬戌]][[Category:properly attributed pages]][[Category:壬戌]][[Category:properly attributed pages]] [[Category:properly attributed pages]][[Category:壬戌]][[Category:properly attributed pages]] [[Category:Unsorted completion categories]] [[Category:qq---qq]] [[Category:qq-Yang Water Dog-qq]] [[Category:ZZZZZZZZZ Unlinked]] [[Category:Sqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqq]] [[Category:qqqq]] [[Category:Sqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqq]] [[Category:qqqq]] [[Category:q--q]] [[Category:Sqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqq]] [[Category:qqqq]] [[Category:bumping to try to fix the sexagenary stuff]][[sn:Yang Water Dog]][[Category:bumping to try to fix the sexagenary stuff]] [[Category:qq]][[sn:Yang Water Dog]][[Category:qq]] [[Category:Sqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqq]] [[Category:qqqq]] [[sn:Yang Water Dog]][[Category:qq]][[sn:Yang Water Dog]][[Category:qq]] [[ja:壬戌]] [[Category:New]] [[Category:qq]][[sn:Yang Water Dog]][[Category:qq]] [[ja:Yang Water Dog]]

{{infobox Chinese|l=Yang Water Dog|kanji=壬戌|romaji=mizunoe inu|onyomi=jinjutsu|p=rénxū|w=jen-hsü|mi=ʐən³⁵ ɕy|y=jam4 seot1|j=jam4 seot1|ci=jɐm sœt̚|mc=ɲiɪm syt|oc-bs=ɲɨm ʔsuʔ|qq=}} {{Sexagenary cycle comprehensive|qq=}} '''Yang Water Dog also known as Jinshitsu''' (壬戌) (みずのえいぬ、じんすいのいぬ、じんじゅつ) is one of the [[:en:Sexagenary cycle|Sexagenary cycle]].
It is the 59th combination in the Sexagenary cycle; the preceding one is {{ill|Xinyou|ja|1=Yin Metal Rooster|2=ja|辛酉|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Xinyou|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Xinyou|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Metal Rooster|qq=}} and the following one is {{ill|Guihai|ja|1=Yin Water Pig|2=ja|癸亥|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Guihai|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Guihai|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Water Pig|qq=}}. In the system of {{ill|Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|ja|陰陽五行思想|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|lt=Yin-Yang Five Elements|lt_ja=陰陽五行|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|qq=}}, the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Ten Heavenly Stems]]’ {{ill|Ren|ja|壬|1=Mizunoe (壬)|lt=Mizunoe (壬)|2=ja|3=壬|4=zh|5=壬|1=Mizunoe (壬)|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ren|13=User:Immanuelle/Mizunoe (壬)|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ren|13=User:Immanuelle/Mizunoe (壬)|qq=}} represents yang {{ill|Water|zh|Water (水)|comment=doing this to prevent wrong interwiki linking by bot|1=Water (wuxing)|lt=Water (水)|comment=doing this to prevent wrong interwiki linking by bot|1=Water (wuxing)|2=uk|3=Вода (У-сін)|4=als|5=Wasser in dr chinesische Fümf-Elemänt-Leer|6=bcl|7=Tubig (wuxing)|8=vi|9=Thủy (Ngũ hành)|10=pt|11=Água (astrologia)|lt=Water (水)|2=uk|3=Вода ==Months of Yang Water Dog== In a Common Era year, if the final digit is 3 or 8 (that is, when the Ten Heavenly Stems are {{ill|Gui|ja|癸|1=Mizunoto (癸)|lt=Mizunoto (癸)|2=ja|3=癸|4=zh|5=癸|1=Mizunoto (癸)|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Gui|13=User:Immanuelle/Mizunoto (癸)|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Gui|13=User:Immanuelle/Mizunoto (癸)|qq=}} or {{ill|Bo|ja|戊|1=Tsuchinoe (戊)|lt=Tsuchinoe (戊)|2=ja|3=戊|4=zh|5=戊|1=Tsuchinoe (戊)|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bo|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsuchinoe (戊)|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bo|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsuchinoe (戊)|qq=}}), then [[:en:September|September]] becomes the [[:en:Month|Month]] of Jinshitsu. However, the term “month” here may refer either to the month of the {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} or to a seasonal month (from [[:en:Hanlu|Hanro]] until the day before [[:en:Lidong|Rittō]]) as applicable.
==Days of Yang Water Dog== === Day Selection === A day of Jinshitsu is one of the intercalary days from {{ill|Hassen|ja|八専|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hassen|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hassen|qq=}}. == See Also == * {{prefix|qq=}} * {{intitle|qq=}}

It is the 59th combination in the Sexagenary cycle; the preceding one is {{ill|Xinyou|ja|1=Yin Metal Rooster|2=ja|辛酉|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Xinyou|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Xinyou|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Metal Rooster|qq=}} and the following one is {{ill|Guihai|ja|1=Yin Water Pig|2=ja|癸亥|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Guihai|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Guihai|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Water Pig|qq=}}. ==Months of Yang Water Dog== In a Common Era year, if the final digit is 3 or 8 (that is, when the Ten Heavenly Stems are {{ill|Gui|ja|癸|1=Mizunoto (癸)|lt=Mizunoto (癸)|2=ja|3=癸|4=zh|5=癸|1=Mizunoto (癸)|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Gui|13=User:Immanuelle/Mizunoto (癸)|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Gui|13=User:Immanuelle/Mizunoto (癸)|qq=}} or {{ill|Bo|ja|戊|1=Tsuchinoe (戊)|lt=Tsuchinoe (戊)|2=ja|3=戊|4=zh|5=戊|1=Tsuchinoe (戊)|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bo|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsuchinoe (戊)|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bo|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsuchinoe (戊)|qq=}}), then [[:en:September|September]] becomes the [[:en:Month|Month]] of Jinshitsu. However, the term “month” here may refer either to the month of the {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} or to a seasonal month (from [[:en:Hanlu|Hanro]] until the day before [[:en:Lidong|Rittō]]) as applicable.
==Days of Yang Water Dog== === Day Selection === A day of Jinshitsu is one of the intercalary days from {{ill|Hassen|ja|八専|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hassen|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hassen|qq=}}. == See Also == * {{prefix|qq=}} * {{intitle|qq=}}

==Months of Yang Water Dog== In a Common Era year, if the final digit is 3 or 8 (that is, when the Ten Heavenly Stems are {{ill|Gui|ja|癸|1=Mizunoto (癸)|lt=Mizunoto (癸)|2=ja|3=癸|4=zh|5=癸|1=Mizunoto (癸)|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Gui|13=User:Immanuelle/Mizunoto (癸)|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Gui|13=User:Immanuelle/Mizunoto (癸)|qq=}} or {{ill|Bo|ja|戊|1=Tsuchinoe (戊)|lt=Tsuchinoe (戊)|2=ja|3=戊|4=zh|5=戊|1=Tsuchinoe (戊)|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bo|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsuchinoe (戊)|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bo|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsuchinoe (戊)|qq=}}), then [[:en:September|September]] becomes the [[:en:Month|Month]] of Jinshitsu. However, the term “month” here may refer either to the month of the {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} or to a seasonal month (from [[:en:Hanlu|Hanro]] until the day before [[:en:Lidong|Rittō]]) as applicable.
==Days of Yang Water Dog== === Day Selection === A day of Jinshitsu is one of the intercalary days from {{ill|Hassen|ja|八専|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hassen|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hassen|qq=}}. == See Also == * {{prefix|qq=}} * {{intitle|qq=}}

{{infobox Chinese|l=Yang Water Dog|kanji=壬戌|romaji=mizunoe inu|onyomi=jinjutsu|p=rénxū|w=jen-hsü|mi=ʐən³⁵ ɕy|y=jam4 seot1|j=jam4 seot1|ci=jɐm sœt̚|mc=ɲiɪm syt|oc-bs=ɲɨm ʔsuʔ|qq=}} {{Sexagenary cycle comprehensive|qq=}} '''Yang Water Dog also known as Jinshitsu''' (壬戌) (みずのえいぬ、じんすいのいぬ、じんじゅつ) is one of the [[:en:Sexagenary cycle|Sexagenary cycle]].
It is the 59th combination in the Sexagenary cycle; the preceding one is {{ill|Xinyou|ja|1=Yin Metal Rooster|2=ja|辛酉|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Xinyou|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Xinyou|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Metal Rooster|qq=}} and the following one is {{ill|Guihai|ja|1=Yin Water Pig|2=ja|癸亥|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Guihai|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Guihai|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Water Pig|qq=}}. ==Months of Yang Water Dog== In a Common Era year, if the final digit is 3 or 8 (that is, when the Ten Heavenly Stems are {{ill|Gui|ja|癸|1=Mizunoto (癸)|lt=Mizunoto (癸)|2=ja|3=癸|4=zh|5=癸|1=Mizunoto (癸)|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Gui|13=User:Immanuelle/Mizunoto (癸)|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Gui|13=User:Immanuelle/Mizunoto (癸)|qq=}} or {{ill|Bo|ja|戊|1=Tsuchinoe (戊)|lt=Tsuchinoe (戊)|2=ja|3=戊|4=zh|5=戊|1=Tsuchinoe (戊)|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bo|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsuchinoe (戊)|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bo|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsuchinoe (戊)|qq=}}), then [[:en:September|September]] becomes the [[:en:Month|Month]] of Jinshitsu. However, the term “month” here may refer either to the month of the {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} or to a seasonal month (from [[:en:Hanlu|Hanro]] until the day before [[:en:Lidong|Rittō]]) as applicable.
==Days of Yang Water Dog== === Day Selection === A day of Jinshitsu is one of the intercalary days from {{ill|Hassen|ja|八専|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hassen|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hassen|qq=}}. == See Also == * {{prefix|qq=}} * {{intitle|qq=}}

==Months of Yang Water Dog== In a Common Era year, if the final digit is 3 or 8 (that is, when the Ten Heavenly Stems are {{ill|Gui|ja|癸|1=Mizunoto (癸)|lt=Mizunoto (癸)|2=ja|3=癸|4=zh|5=癸|1=Mizunoto (癸)|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Gui|13=User:Immanuelle/Mizunoto (癸)|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Gui|13=User:Immanuelle/Mizunoto (癸)|qq=}} or {{ill|Bo|ja|戊|1=Tsuchinoe (戊)|lt=Tsuchinoe (戊)|2=ja|3=戊|4=zh|5=戊|1=Tsuchinoe (戊)|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bo|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsuchinoe (戊)|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bo|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsuchinoe (戊)|qq=}}), then [[:en:September|September]] becomes the [[:en:Month|Month]] of Jinshitsu. However, the term “month” here may refer either to the month of the {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} or to a seasonal month (from [[:en:Hanlu|Hanro]] until the day before [[:en:Lidong|Rittō]]) as applicable.
==Days of Yang Water Dog== === Day Selection === A day of Jinshitsu is one of the intercalary days from {{ill|Hassen|ja|八専|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hassen|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hassen|qq=}}. == See Also == * {{prefix|qq=}} * {{intitle|qq=}}

It is the 59th combination in the Sexagenary cycle; the preceding one is {{ill|Xinyou|ja|1=Yin Metal Rooster|2=ja|辛酉|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Xinyou|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Xinyou|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Metal Rooster|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} and the following one is {{ill|Guihai|ja|1=Yin Water Pig|2=ja|癸亥|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Guihai|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Guihai|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Water Pig|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. ==Months of Yang Water Dog== In a Common Era year, if the final digit is 3 or 8 (that is, when the Ten Heavenly Stems are {{ill|Gui|ja|癸|1=Mizunoto (癸)|lt=Mizunoto (癸)|2=ja|3=癸|4=zh|5=癸|1=Mizunoto (癸)|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Gui|13=User:Immanuelle/Mizunoto (癸)|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Gui|13=User:Immanuelle/Mizunoto (癸)|qq=}} or {{ill|Bo|ja|戊|1=Tsuchinoe (戊)|lt=Tsuchinoe (戊)|2=ja|3=戊|4=zh|5=戊|1=Tsuchinoe (戊)|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bo|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsuchinoe (戊)|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bo|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsuchinoe (戊)|qq=}}), then [[:en:September|September]] becomes the [[:en:Month|Month]] of Jinshitsu. However, the term “month” here may refer either to the month of the {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} or to a seasonal month (from [[:en:Hanlu|Hanro]] until the day before [[:en:Lidong|Rittō]]) as applicable.
==Days of Yang Water Dog== === Day Selection === A day of Jinshitsu is one of the intercalary days from {{ill|Hassen|ja|八専|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hassen|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hassen|qq=}}. == See Also == * {{prefix|qq=}} * {{intitle|qq=}}

It is the 59th combination in the Sexagenary cycle; the preceding one is {{ill|Xinyou|ja|1=Yin Metal Rooster|2=ja|辛酉|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Xinyou|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Xinyou|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Metal Rooster|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} and the following one is {{ill|Guihai|ja|1=Yin Water Pig|2=ja|癸亥|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Guihai|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Guihai|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Water Pig|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. ==Months of Yang Water Dog== In a Common Era year, if the final digit is 3 or 8 (that is, when the Ten Heavenly Stems are {{ill|Gui|ja|癸|1=Mizunoto (癸)|lt=Mizunoto (癸)|2=ja|3=癸|4=zh|5=癸|1=Mizunoto (癸)|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Gui|13=User:Immanuelle/Mizunoto (癸)|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Gui|13=User:Immanuelle/Mizunoto (癸)|qq=}} or {{ill|Bo|ja|戊|1=Tsuchinoe (戊)|lt=Tsuchinoe (戊)|2=ja|3=戊|4=zh|5=戊|1=Tsuchinoe (戊)|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bo|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsuchinoe (戊)|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bo|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsuchinoe (戊)|qq=}}), then [[:en:September|September]] becomes the [[:en:Month|Month]] of Jinshitsu. However, the term “month” here may refer either to the month of the {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} or to a seasonal month (from [[:en:Hanlu|Hanro]] until the day before [[:en:Lidong|Rittō]]) as applicable.
==Days of Yang Water Dog== === Day Selection === A day of Jinshitsu is one of the intercalary days from {{ill|Hassen|ja|八専|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hassen|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hassen|qq=}}. == See Also == * {{prefix|qq=}} * {{intitle|qq=}}

{{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[d:Q904937]] Wikidata name: Yang Water Dog [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 10:28, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}} {{infobox Chinese|l=Yang Water Dog|kanji=壬戌|romaji=mizunoe inu|onyomi=jinjutsu|p=rénxū|w=jen-hsü|mi=ʐən³⁵ ɕy|y=jam4 seot1|j=jam4 seot1|ci=jɐm sœt̚|mc=ɲiɪm syt|oc-bs=ɲɨm ʔsuʔ|qq=}} {{Sexagenary cycle comprehensive|qq=}} '''Yang Water Dog also known as Jinshitsu''' (壬戌) (みずのえいぬ、じんすいのいぬ、じんじゅつ) is one of the [[:en:Sexagenary cycle|Sexagenary cycle]].
It is the 59th combination in the Sexagenary cycle; the preceding one is {{ill|Xinyou|ja|1=Yin Metal Rooster|2=ja|辛酉|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Xinyou|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Xinyou|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Metal Rooster|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} and the following one is {{ill|Guihai|ja|1=Yin Water Pig|2=ja|癸亥|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Guihai|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Guihai|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Water Pig|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. In the system of {{ill|Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|ja|陰陽五行思想|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|lt=Yin-Yang Five Elements|lt_ja=陰陽五行|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|qq=}}, the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Ten Heavenly Stems]]’ {{ill|Ren|ja|壬|1=Mizunoe (壬)|lt=Mizunoe (壬)|2=ja|3=壬|4=zh|5=壬|1=Mizunoe (壬)|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ren|13=User:Immanuelle/Mizunoe (壬)|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ren|13=User:Immanuelle/Mizunoe (壬)|qq=}} represents yang {{ill|Water|zh|Water (水)|comment=doing this to prevent wrong interwiki linking by bot|1=Water (wuxing)|lt=Water (水)|comment=doing this to prevent wrong interwiki linking by It is the 59th combination in the Sexagenary cycle; the preceding one is {{ill|Xinyou|ja|1=Yin Metal Rooster|2=ja|辛酉|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Xinyou|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Xinyou|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Metal Rooster|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} and the following one is {{ill|Guihai|ja|1=Yin Water Pig|2=ja|癸亥|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Guihai|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Guihai|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Water Pig|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. ==Pronunciation== * English: Yang Water Dog (壬戌) ** Chinese (Mandarin Pinyin): rénxū ** Cantonese (Jyutping): jam4 seot1 ** Japanese: ***Kunyomi 1: Mizunoe-inu ***Kunyomi 2: Jinsui-no-inu ***Onyomi 1: jinjitsu ** Korean (Revised Romanization, Hangul): im sul (임술) ** Vietnamese (Hán-Việt): Nhâm Tuất

==Months of Yang Water Dog== In a Common Era year, if the final digit is 3 or 8 (that is, when the Ten Heavenly Stems are {{ill|Gui|ja|癸|1=Mizunoto (癸)|lt=Mizunoto (癸)|2=ja|3=癸|4=zh|5=癸|1=Mizunoto (癸)|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Gui|13=User:Immanuelle/Mizunoto (癸)|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Gui|13=User:Immanuelle/Mizunoto (癸)|qq=}} or {{ill|Bo|ja|戊|1=Tsuchinoe (戊)|lt=Tsuchinoe (戊)|2=ja|3=戊|4=zh|5=戊|1=Tsuchinoe (戊)|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bo|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsuchinoe (戊)|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bo|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsuchinoe (戊)|qq=}}), then [[:en:September|September]] becomes the [[:en:Month|Month]] of Jinshitsu. However, the term “month” here may refer either to the month of the {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} or to a seasonal month (from [[:en:Hanlu|Hanro]] until the day before [[:en:Lidong|Rittō]]) as applicable.
==Days of Yang Water Dog== === Day Selection === A day of Jinshitsu is one of the intercalary days from {{ill|Hassen|ja|八専|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hassen|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hassen|qq=}}. == See Also == * {{prefix|qq=}} * {{intitle|qq=}}

==Months of Yang Water Dog== In a Common Era year, if the final digit is 3 or 8 (that is, when the Ten Heavenly Stems are {{ill|Gui|ja|癸|1=Mizunoto (癸)|lt=Mizunoto (癸)|2=ja|3=癸|4=zh|5=癸|1=Mizunoto (癸)|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Gui|13=User:Immanuelle/Mizunoto (癸)|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Gui|13=User:Immanuelle/Mizunoto (癸)|qq=}} or {{ill|Bo|ja|戊|1=Tsuchinoe (戊)|lt=Tsuchinoe (戊)|2=ja|3=戊|4=zh|5=戊|1=Tsuchinoe (戊)|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bo|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsuchinoe (戊)|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bo|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsuchinoe (戊)|qq=}}), then [[:en:September|September]] becomes the [[:en:Month|Month]] of Jinshitsu. However, the term “month” here may refer either to the month of the {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} or to a seasonal month (from [[:en:Hanlu|Hanro]] until the day before [[:en:Lidong|Rittō]]) as applicable.
==Days of Yang Water Dog== === Day Selection === A day of Jinshitsu is one of the intercalary days from {{ill|Hassen|ja|八専|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hassen|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hassen|qq=}}. == See Also == * {{prefix|qq=}} * {{intitle|qq=}}

==Months of Yang Water Dog== In a Common Era year, if the final digit is 3 or 8 (that is, when the Ten Heavenly Stems are {{ill|Gui|ja|癸|1=Mizunoto (癸)|lt=Mizunoto (癸)|2=ja|3=癸|4=zh|5=癸|1=Mizunoto (癸)|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Gui|13=User:Immanuelle/Mizunoto (癸)|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Gui|13=User:Immanuelle/Mizunoto (癸)|qq=}} or {{ill|Bo|ja|戊|1=Tsuchinoe (戊)|lt=Tsuchinoe (戊)|2=ja|3=戊|4=zh|5=戊|1=Tsuchinoe (戊)|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bo|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsuchinoe (戊)|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bo|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsuchinoe (戊)|qq=}}), then [[:en:September|September]] becomes the [[:en:Month|Month]] of Jinshitsu. However, the term “month” here may refer either to the month of the {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} or to a seasonal month (from [[:en:Hanlu|Hanro]] until the day before [[:en:Lidong|Rittō]]) as applicable.
==Days of Yang Water Dog== === Day Selection === A day of Jinshitsu is one of the intercalary days from {{ill|Hassen|ja|八専|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hassen|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hassen|qq=}}. == See Also == * {{prefix|qq=}} * {{intitle|qq=}}

==Months of Yang Water Dog== In a Common Era year, if the final digit is 3 or 8 (that is, when the Ten Heavenly Stems are {{ill|Gui|ja|癸|1=Mizunoto (癸)|lt=Mizunoto (癸)|2=ja|3=癸|4=zh|5=癸|1=Mizunoto (癸)|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Gui|13=User:Immanuelle/Mizunoto (癸)|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Gui|13=User:Immanuelle/Mizunoto (癸)|qq=}} or {{ill|Bo|ja|戊|1=Tsuchinoe (戊)|lt=Tsuchinoe (戊)|2=ja|3=戊|4=zh|5=戊|1=Tsuchinoe (戊)|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bo|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsuchinoe (戊)|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bo|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsuchinoe (戊)|qq=}}), then [[:en:September|September]] becomes the [[:en:Month|Month]] of Jinshitsu. However, the term “month” here may refer either to the month of the {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} or to a seasonal month (from [[:en:Hanlu|Hanro]] until the day before [[:en:Lidong|Rittō]]) as applicable.
==Days of Yang Water Dog== === Day Selection === A day of Jinshitsu is one of the intercalary days from {{ill|Hassen|ja|八専|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hassen|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hassen|qq=}}. == See Also == * {{prefix|qq=}} * {{intitle|qq=}}

==Months of Yang Water Dog== In a Common Era year, if the final digit is 3 or 8 (that is, when the Ten Heavenly Stems are {{ill|Gui|ja|癸|1=Mizunoto (癸)|lt=Mizunoto (癸)|2=ja|3=癸|4=zh|5=癸|1=Mizunoto (癸)|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Gui|13=User:Immanuelle/Mizunoto (癸)|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Gui|13=User:Immanuelle/Mizunoto (癸)|qq=}} or {{ill|Bo|ja|戊|1=Tsuchinoe (戊)|lt=Tsuchinoe (戊)|2=ja|3=戊|4=zh|5=戊|1=Tsuchinoe (戊)|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bo|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsuchinoe (戊)|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bo|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsuchinoe (戊)|qq=}}), then [[:en:September|September]] becomes the [[:en:Month|Month]] of Jinshitsu. However, the term “month” here may refer either to the month of the {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} or to a seasonal month (from [[:en:Hanlu|Hanro]] until the day before [[:en:Lidong|Rittō]]) as applicable.
==Days of Yang Water Dog== === Day Selection === A day of Jinshitsu is one of the intercalary days from {{ill|Hassen|ja|八専|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hassen|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hassen|qq=}}. == See Also == * {{prefix|qq=}} * {{intitle|qq=}}

It is the 59th combination in the Sexagenary cycle; the preceding one is {{ill|Xinyou|ja|1=Yin Metal Rooster|2=ja|辛酉|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Xinyou|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Xinyou|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Metal Rooster|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} and the following one is {{ill|Guihai|ja|1=Yin Water Pig|2=ja|癸亥|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Guihai|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Guihai|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Water Pig|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. ==Months of Yang Water Dog== In a Common Era year, if the final digit is 3 or 8 (that is, when the Ten Heavenly Stems are {{ill|Gui|ja|癸|1=Mizunoto (癸)|lt=Mizunoto (癸)|2=ja|3=癸|4=zh|5=癸|1=Mizunoto (癸)|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Gui|13=User:Immanuelle/Mizunoto (癸)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Gui|13=User:Immanuelle/Mizunoto (癸)|qq=}} or {{ill|Bo|ja|戊|1=Tsuchinoe (戊)|lt=Tsuchinoe (戊)|2=ja|3=戊|4=zh|5=戊|1=Tsuchinoe (戊)|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bo|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsuchinoe (戊)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bo|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsuchinoe (戊)|qq=}}), then [[:en:September|September]] becomes the [[:en:Month|Month]] of Jinshitsu. However, the term “month” here may refer either to the month of the {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} or to a seasonal month (from [[:en:Hanlu|Hanro]] until the day before [[:en:Lidong|Rittō]]) as applicable.
==Days of Yang Water Dog== === Day Selection === A day of Jinshitsu is one of the intercalary days from {{ill|Hassen|ja|八専|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hassen|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hassen|qq=}}. == See Also == * {{prefix|qq=}} * {{intitle|qq=}}

==Months of Yang Water Dog== In a Common Era year, if the final digit is 3 or 8 (that is, when the Ten Heavenly Stems are {{ill|Gui|ja|癸|1=Mizunoto (癸)|lt=Mizunoto (癸)|2=ja|3=癸|4=zh|5=癸|1=Mizunoto (癸)|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Gui|13=User:Immanuelle/Mizunoto (癸)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Gui|13=User:Immanuelle/Mizunoto (癸)|qq=}} or {{ill|Bo|ja|戊|1=Tsuchinoe (戊)|lt=Tsuchinoe (戊)|2=ja|3=戊|4=zh|5=戊|1=Tsuchinoe (戊)|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bo|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsuchinoe (戊)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bo|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsuchinoe (戊)|qq=}}), then [[:en:September|September]] becomes the [[:en:Month|Month]] of Jinshitsu. However, the term “month” here may refer either to the month of the {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} or to a seasonal month (from [[:en:Hanlu|Hanro]] until the day before [[:en:Lidong|Rittō]]) as applicable.
==Days of Yang Water Dog== === Day Selection === A day of Jinshitsu is one of the intercalary days from {{ill|Hassen|ja|八専|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hassen|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hassen|qq=}}. == See Also == * {{prefix|qq=}} * {{intitle|qq=}}

It is the 59th combination in the Sexagenary cycle; the preceding one is {{ill|Xinyou|ja|1=Yin Metal Rooster|2=ja|辛酉|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Xinyou|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Xinyou|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Metal Rooster|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} and the following one is {{ill|Guihai|ja|1=Yin Water Pig|2=ja|癸亥|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Guihai|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Guihai|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Water Pig|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. Theory|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|qq=}}, the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Ten Heavenly Stems]]’ {{ill|Ren|ja|壬|1=Mizunoe ==Months of Yang Water Dog== In a Common Era year, if the final digit is 3 or 8 (that is, when the Ten Heavenly Stems are {{ill|Gui|ja|癸|1=Mizunoto (癸)|lt=Mizunoto (癸)|2=ja|3=癸|4=zh|5=癸|1=Mizunoto (癸)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Gui|13=User:Immanuelle/Mizunoto (癸)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Gui|13=User:Immanuelle/Mizunoto (癸)|qq=}} or {{ill|Bo|ja|戊|1=Tsuchinoe (戊)|lt=Tsuchinoe (戊)|2=ja|3=戊|4=zh|5=戊|1=Tsuchinoe (戊)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bo|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsuchinoe (戊)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bo|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsuchinoe (戊)|qq=}}), then [[:en:September|September]] becomes the [[:en:Month|Month]] of Jinshitsu. However, the term “month” here may refer either to the month of the {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} or to a seasonal month (from [[:en:Hanlu|Hanro]] until the day before [[:en:Lidong|Rittō]]) as applicable.
==Days of Yang Water Dog== === Day Selection === A day of Jinshitsu is one of the intercalary days from {{ill|Hassen|ja|八専|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hassen|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hassen|qq=}}. == See Also == * {{prefix|qq=}} * {{intitle|qq=}}

<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[af:Waterhond (astrologie)]][[cdo:Ìng-sáe̤k]][[de:Wasser-Hund]][[hak:Ngìm-sut]][[ja:壬戌]][[ko:임술]][[vi:Nhâm Tuất]][[za:Nyaemzswt]][[zh-min-nan:Jîm-sut]][[zh-yue:壬戌]][[zh:壬戌]] {{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[d:Q904937]] Wikidata name: Yang Water Dog [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 10:28, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}} {{infobox Chinese|l=Yang Water Dog|kanji=壬戌|romaji=mizunoe inu|onyomi=jinjutsu|p=rénxū|w=jen-hsü|mi=ʐən³⁵ ɕy|y=jam4 seot1|j=jam4 seot1|ci=jɐm sœt̚|mc=ɲiɪm syt|oc-bs=ɲɨm ʔsuʔ|qq=}} {{Sexagenary cycle comprehensive|qq=}} '''Yang Water Dog also known as Jinshitsu''' (壬戌) (みずのえいぬ、じんすいのいぬ、じんじゅつ) is one of the [[:en:Sexagenary cycle|Sexagenary cycle]].
It is the 59th combination in the Sexagenary cycle; the preceding one is {{ill|Xinyou|ja|1=Yin Metal Rooster|2=ja|辛酉|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Xinyou|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Xinyou|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Metal Rooster|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} and the following one is {{ill|Guihai|ja|1=Yin Water Pig|2=ja|癸亥|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Guihai|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Guihai|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Water Pig|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. In the system of {{ill|Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|ja|陰陽五行思想|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|lt=Yin-Yang Five Elements|lt_ja=陰陽五行|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|qq=}}, the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Ten Heavenly Stems]]’ {{ill|Ren|ja|壬|1=Mizunoe (壬)|lt=Mizunoe (壬)|2=ja|3=壬|4=zh|5=壬|1=Mizunoe (壬)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ren|13=User:Immanuelle/Mizunoe (壬)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ren|13=User:Immanuelle/Mizunoe (壬)|qq=}} represents yang ==Months of Yang Water Dog== In a Common Era year, if the final digit is 3 or 8 (that is, when the Ten Heavenly Stems are {{ill|Gui|ja|癸|1=Mizunoto (癸)|lt=Mizunoto (癸)|2=ja|3=癸|4=zh|5=癸|1=Mizunoto (癸)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Gui|13=User:Immanuelle/Mizunoto (癸)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Gui|13=User:Immanuelle/Mizunoto (癸)|qq=}} or {{ill|Bo|ja|戊|1=Tsuchinoe (戊)|lt=Tsuchinoe (戊)|2=ja|3=戊|4=zh|5=戊|1=Tsuchinoe (戊)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bo|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsuchinoe (戊)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bo|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsuchinoe (戊)|qq=}}), then [[:en:September|September]] becomes the [[:en:Month|Month]] of Jinshitsu. However, the term “month” here may refer either to the month of the {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} or to a seasonal month (from [[:en:Hanlu|Hanro]] until the day before [[:en:Lidong|Rittō]]) as applicable.
==Days of Yang Water Dog== === Day Selection === A day of Jinshitsu is one of the intercalary days from {{ill|Hassen|ja|八専|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hassen|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hassen|qq=}}. == See Also == * {{prefix|qq=}} * {{intitle|qq=}}

<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[af:Waterhond (astrologie)]][[cdo:Ìng-sáe̤k]][[de:Wasser-Hund]][[hak:Ngìm-sut]][[ja:壬戌]][[ko:임술]][[vi:Nhâm Tuất]][[za:Nyaemzswt]][[zh-min-nan:Jîm-sut]][[zh-yue:壬戌]][[zh:壬戌]] {{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[d:Q904937]] Wikidata name: Yang Water Dog [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 10:28, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}} {{infobox Chinese|l=Yang Water Dog|kanji=壬戌|romaji=mizunoe inu|onyomi=jinjutsu|p=rénxū|w=jen-hsü|mi=ʐən³⁵ ɕy|y=jam4 seot1|j=jam4 seot1|ci=jɐm sœt̚|mc=ɲiɪm syt|oc-bs=ɲɨm ʔsuʔ|qq=}} {{Sexagenary cycle comprehensive|qq=}} '''Yang Water Dog also known as Jinshitsu''' (壬戌) (みずのえいぬ、じんすいのいぬ、じんじゅつ) is one of the [[:en:Sexagenary cycle|Sexagenary cycle]].
It is the 59th combination in the Sexagenary cycle; the preceding one is {{ill|Xinyou|ja|1=Yin Metal Rooster|2=ja|辛酉|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Xinyou|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Xinyou|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Metal Rooster|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} and the following one is {{ill|Guihai|ja|1=Yin Water Pig|2=ja|癸亥|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Guihai|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Guihai|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Water Pig|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. In the system of {{ill|Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|ja|陰陽五行思想|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|lt=Yin-Yang Five Elements|lt_ja=陰陽五行|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|qq=}}, the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Ten Heavenly Stems]]’ {{ill|Ren|ja|壬|1=Mizunoe (壬)|lt=Mizunoe (壬)|2=ja|3=壬|4=zh|5=壬|1=Mizunoe (壬)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ren|13=User:Immanuelle/Mizunoe (壬)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ren|13=User:Immanuelle/Mizunoe (壬)|qq=}} represents yang It is the 59th combination in the Sexagenary cycle; the preceding one is {{ill|Xinyou|ja|1=Yin Metal Rooster|2=ja|辛酉|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Xinyou|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Xinyou|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Metal Rooster|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} and the following one is {{ill|Guihai|ja|1=Yin Water Pig|2=ja|癸亥|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Guihai|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Guihai|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Water Pig|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. Theory|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|qq=}}, the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Ten Heavenly Stems]]’ {{ill|Ren|ja|壬|1=Mizunoe ==Pronunciation== * English: Yang Water Dog (壬戌) ** Chinese (Mandarin Pinyin): rénxū ** Cantonese (Jyutping): jam4 seot1 ** Japanese: ***Kunyomi 1: Mizunoe-inu ***Kunyomi 2: Jinsui-no-inu ***Onyomi 1: jinjitsu ** Korean (Revised Romanization, Hangul): im sul (임술) ** Vietnamese (Hán-Việt): Nhâm Tuất
<!-- == * Yang Water Dog (壬戌) ** Chinese (Mandarin Pinyin): rénxū ** Cantonese (Jyutping): jam4 zeoi3 ** Japanese: ***Kunyomi: みずのえいぬ (mizunoe-inu) ***Onyomi: じんかのいぬ (jinka-no-inu) ***Onyomi: じんじゅつ (jinjutsu) ** Korean (Revised Romanization): imsuk ** Vietnamese (Hán-Việt): Nhâm Tuất
--> ==Years of Yang Water Dog== A year in the [[:en:Common Era|Common Era]] that leaves a remainder of 2 when divided by 60 is a [[:en:Year|Year]] of Jinshitsu. {| class="wikitable" |+ '''Years of Jinshitsu''' |- ! ==Months of Yang Water Dog== In a Common Era year, if the final digit is 3 or 8 (that is, when the Ten Heavenly Stems are {{ill|Gui|ja|癸|1=Mizunoto (癸)|lt=Mizunoto (癸)|2=ja|3=癸|4=zh|5=癸|1=Mizunoto (癸)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Gui|13=User:Immanuelle/Mizunoto (癸)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Gui|13=User:Immanuelle/Mizunoto (癸)|qq=}} or {{ill|Bo|ja|戊|1=Tsuchinoe (戊)|lt=Tsuchinoe (戊)|2=ja|3=戊|4=zh|5=戊|1=Tsuchinoe (戊)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bo|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsuchinoe (戊)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bo|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsuchinoe (戊)|qq=}}), then [[:en:September|September]] becomes the [[:en:Month|Month]] of Jinshitsu. However, the term “month” here may refer either to the month of the {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} or to a seasonal month (from [[:en:Hanlu|Hanro]] until the day before [[:en:Lidong|Rittō]]) as applicable.
==Days of Yang Water Dog== === Day Selection === A day of Jinshitsu is one of the intercalary days from {{ill|Hassen|ja|八専|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hassen|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hassen|qq=}}. == See Also == * {{prefix|qq=}} * {{intitle|qq=}}

==Months of Yang Water Dog== In a Common Era year, if the final digit is 3 or 8 (that is, when the Ten Heavenly Stems are {{ill|Gui|ja|癸|1=Mizunoto (癸)|lt=Mizunoto (癸)|2=ja|3=癸|4=zh|5=癸|1=Mizunoto (癸)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Gui|13=User:Immanuelle/Mizunoto (癸)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Gui|13=User:Immanuelle/Mizunoto (癸)|qq=}} or {{ill|Bo|ja|戊|1=Tsuchinoe (戊)|lt=Tsuchinoe (戊)|2=ja|3=戊|4=zh|5=戊|1=Tsuchinoe (戊)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bo|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsuchinoe (戊)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bo|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsuchinoe (戊)|qq=}}), then [[:en:September|September]] becomes the [[:en:Month|Month]] of Jinshitsu. However, the term “month” here may refer either to the month of the {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} or to a seasonal month (from [[:en:Hanlu|Hanro]] until the day before [[:en:Lidong|Rittō]]) as applicable.
==Days of Yang Water Dog== === Day Selection === A day of Jinshitsu is one of the intercalary days from {{ill|Hassen|ja|八専|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hassen|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hassen|qq=}}. == See Also == * {{prefix|qq=}} * {{intitle|qq=}}

It is the 59th combination in the Sexagenary cycle; the preceding one is {{ill|Xinyou|ja|1=Yin Metal Rooster|2=ja|辛酉|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Xinyou|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Xinyou|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Metal Rooster|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} and the following one is {{ill|Guihai|ja|1=Yin Water Pig|2=ja|癸亥|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Guihai|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Guihai|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Water Pig|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. Theory|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|qq=}}, the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Ten Heavenly Stems]]’ {{ill|Ren|ja|壬|1=Mizunoe ==Months of Yang Water Dog== In a Common Era year, if the final digit is 3 or 8 (that is, when the Ten Heavenly Stems are {{ill|Gui|ja|癸|1=Mizunoto (癸)|lt=Mizunoto (癸)|2=ja|3=癸|4=zh|5=癸|1=Mizunoto (癸)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Gui|13=User:Immanuelle/Mizunoto (癸)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Gui|13=User:Immanuelle/Mizunoto (癸)|qq=}} or {{ill|Bo|ja|戊|1=Tsuchinoe (戊)|lt=Tsuchinoe (戊)|2=ja|3=戊|4=zh|5=戊|1=Tsuchinoe (戊)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bo|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsuchinoe (戊)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bo|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsuchinoe (戊)|qq=}}), then [[:en:September|September]] becomes the [[:en:Month|Month]] of Jinshitsu. However, the term “month” here may refer either to the month of the {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} or to a seasonal month (from [[:en:Hanlu|Hanro]] until the day before [[:en:Lidong|Rittō]]) as applicable.
==Days of Yang Water Dog== === Day Selection === A day of Jinshitsu is one of the intercalary days from {{ill|Hassen|ja|八専|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hassen|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hassen|qq=}}. == See Also == * {{prefix|qq=}} * {{intitle|qq=}}

It is the 59th combination in the Sexagenary cycle; the preceding one is {{ill|Xinyou|ja|1=Yin Metal Rooster|2=ja|辛酉|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Xinyou|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Xinyou|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Metal Rooster|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} and the following one is {{ill|Guihai|ja|1=Yin Water Pig|2=ja|癸亥|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Guihai|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Guihai|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Water Pig|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. ==Months of Yang Water Dog== In a Common Era year, if the final digit is 3 or 8 (that is, when the Ten Heavenly Stems are {{ill|Gui|ja|癸|1=Mizunoto (癸)|lt=Mizunoto (癸)|2=ja|3=癸|4=zh|5=癸|1=Mizunoto (癸)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Gui|13=User:Immanuelle/Mizunoto (癸)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Gui|13=User:Immanuelle/Mizunoto (癸)|qq=}} or {{ill|Bo|ja|戊|1=Tsuchinoe (戊)|lt=Tsuchinoe (戊)|2=ja|3=戊|4=zh|5=戊|1=Tsuchinoe (戊)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bo|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsuchinoe (戊)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bo|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsuchinoe (戊)|qq=}}), then [[:en:September|September]] becomes the [[:en:Month|Month]] of Jinshitsu. However, the term “month” here may refer either to the month of the {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} or to a seasonal month (from [[:en:Hanlu|Hanro]] until the day before [[:en:Lidong|Rittō]]) as applicable.

It is the 59th combination in the Sexagenary cycle; the preceding one is {{ill|Xinyou|ja|1=Yin Metal Rooster|2=ja|辛酉|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Xinyou|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Xinyou|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Metal Rooster|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} and the following one is {{ill|Guihai|ja|1=Yin Water Pig|2=ja|癸亥|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Guihai|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Guihai|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Water Pig|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. In the system of {{ill|Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|ja|陰陽五行思想|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|lt=Yin-Yang Five Elements|lt_ja=陰陽五行|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|qq=}}, the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Ten Heavenly Stems]]’ {{ill|Ren|ja|壬|1=Mizunoe It is the 59th combination in the Sexagenary cycle; the preceding one is {{ill|Xinyou|ja|1=Yin Metal Rooster|2=ja|辛酉|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Xinyou|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Xinyou|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Metal Rooster|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} and the following one is {{ill|Guihai|ja|1=Yin Water Pig|2=ja|癸亥|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Guihai|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Guihai|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Water Pig|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. ==Months of Yang Water Dog== In a Common Era year, if the final digit is 3 or 8 (that is, when the Ten Heavenly Stems are {{ill|Gui|ja|癸|1=Mizunoto (癸)|lt=Mizunoto (癸)|2=ja|3=癸|4=zh|5=癸|1=Mizunoto (癸)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Gui|13=User:Immanuelle/Mizunoto (癸)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Gui|13=User:Immanuelle/Mizunoto (癸)|qq=}} or {{ill|Bo|ja|戊|1=Tsuchinoe (戊)|lt=Tsuchinoe (戊)|2=ja|3=戊|4=zh|5=戊|1=Tsuchinoe (戊)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bo|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsuchinoe (戊)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bo|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsuchinoe (戊)|qq=}}), then [[:en:September|September]] becomes the [[:en:Month|Month]] of Jinshitsu. However, the term “month” here may refer either to the month of the {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} or to a seasonal month (from [[:en:Hanlu|Hanro]] until the day before [[:en:Lidong|Rittō]]) as applicable.
==Days of Yang Water Dog== === Day Selection === A day of Jinshitsu is one of the intercalary days from {{ill|Hassen|ja|八専|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hassen|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hassen|qq=}}. == See Also == * {{prefix|qq=}} * {{intitle|qq=}}

==Months of Yang Water Dog== In a Common Era year, if the final digit is 3 or 8 (that is, when the Ten Heavenly Stems are {{ill|Gui|ja|癸|1=Mizunoto (癸)|lt=Mizunoto (癸)|2=ja|3=癸|4=zh|5=癸|1=Mizunoto (癸)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Gui|13=User:Immanuelle/Mizunoto (癸)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Gui|13=User:Immanuelle/Mizunoto (癸)|qq=}} or {{ill|Bo|ja|戊|1=Tsuchinoe (戊)|lt=Tsuchinoe (戊)|2=ja|3=戊|4=zh|5=戊|1=Tsuchinoe (戊)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bo|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsuchinoe (戊)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bo|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsuchinoe (戊)|qq=}}), then [[:en:September|September]] becomes the [[:en:Month|Month]] of Jinshitsu. However, the term “month” here may refer either to the month of the {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} or to a seasonal month (from [[:en:Hanlu|Hanro]] until the day before [[:en:Lidong|Rittō]]) as applicable.
==Days of Yang Water Dog== === Day Selection === A day of Jinshitsu is one of the intercalary days from {{ill|Hassen|ja|八専|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hassen|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hassen|qq=}}. == See Also == * {{prefix|qq=}} * {{intitle|qq=}}

It is the 59th combination in the Sexagenary cycle; the preceding one is {{ill|Xinyou|ja|1=Yin Metal Rooster|2=ja|辛酉|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Xinyou|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Xinyou|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Metal Rooster|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} and the following one is {{ill|Guihai|ja|1=Yin Water Pig|2=ja|癸亥|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Guihai|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Guihai|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Water Pig|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. In the system of {{ill|Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|ja|陰陽五行思想|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|lt=Yin-Yang Five Elements|lt_ja=陰陽五行|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|qq=}}, the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Ten Heavenly Stems]]’ {{ill|Ren|ja|壬|1=Mizunoe (壬)|lt=Mizunoe (壬)|2=ja|3=壬|4=zh|5=壬|1=Mizunoe (壬)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ren|13=User:Immanuelle/Mizunoe (壬)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ren|13=User:Immanuelle/Mizunoe (壬)|qq=}} represents yang ==Months of Yang Water Dog== In a Common Era year, if the final digit is 3 or 8 (that is, when the Ten Heavenly Stems are {{ill|Gui|ja|癸|1=Mizunoto (癸)|lt=Mizunoto (癸)|2=ja|3=癸|4=zh|5=癸|1=Mizunoto (癸)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Gui|13=User:Immanuelle/Mizunoto (癸)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Gui|13=User:Immanuelle/Mizunoto (癸)|qq=}} or {{ill|Bo|ja|戊|1=Tsuchinoe (戊)|lt=Tsuchinoe (戊)|2=ja|3=戊|4=zh|5=戊|1=Tsuchinoe (戊)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bo|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsuchinoe (戊)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bo|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsuchinoe (戊)|qq=}}), then [[:en:September|September]] becomes the [[:en:Month|Month]] of Jinshitsu. However, the term “month” here may refer either to the month of the {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} or to a seasonal month (from [[:en:Hanlu|Hanro]] until the day before [[:en:Lidong|Rittō]]) as applicable.
==Days of Yang Water Dog== === Day Selection === A day of Jinshitsu is one of the intercalary days from {{ill|Hassen|ja|八専|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hassen|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hassen|qq=}}. == See Also == * {{prefix|qq=}} * {{intitle|qq=}}

It is the 59th combination in the Sexagenary cycle; the preceding one is {{ill|Xinyou|ja|1=Yin Metal Rooster|2=ja|辛酉|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Xinyou|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Xinyou|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Metal Rooster|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} and the following one is {{ill|Guihai|ja|1=Yin Water Pig|2=ja|癸亥|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Guihai|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Guihai|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Water Pig|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. ==Months of Yang Water Dog== In a Common Era year, if the final digit is 3 or 8 (that is, when the Ten Heavenly Stems are {{ill|Gui|ja|癸|1=Mizunoto (癸)|lt=Mizunoto (癸)|2=ja|3=癸|4=zh|5=癸|1=Mizunoto (癸)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Gui|13=User:Immanuelle/Mizunoto (癸)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Gui|13=User:Immanuelle/Mizunoto (癸)|qq=}} or {{ill|Bo|ja|戊|1=Tsuchinoe (戊)|lt=Tsuchinoe (戊)|2=ja|3=戊|4=zh|5=戊|1=Tsuchinoe (戊)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bo|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsuchinoe (戊)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bo|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsuchinoe (戊)|qq=}}), then [[:en:September|September]] becomes the [[:en:Month|Month]] of Jinshitsu. However, the term “month” here may refer either to the month of the {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} or to a seasonal month (from [[:en:Hanlu|Hanro]] until the day before [[:en:Lidong|Rittō]]) as applicable.
==Days of Yang Water Dog== === Day Selection === A day of Jinshitsu is one of the intercalary days from {{ill|Hassen|ja|八専|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hassen|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hassen|qq=}}. == See Also == * {{prefix|qq=}} * {{intitle|qq=}}

It is the 59th combination in the Sexagenary cycle; the preceding one is {{ill|Xinyou|ja|1=Yin Metal Rooster|2=ja|辛酉|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Xinyou|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Xinyou|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Metal Rooster|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} and the following one is {{ill|Guihai|ja|1=Yin Water Pig|2=ja|癸亥|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Guihai|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Guihai|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Water Pig|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. In the system of {{ill|Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|ja|陰陽五行思想|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|lt=Yin-Yang Five Elements|lt_ja=陰陽五行|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|qq=}}, the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Ten Heavenly Stems]]’ {{ill|Ren|ja|壬|1=Mizunoe (壬)|lt=Mizunoe (壬)|2=ja|3=壬|4=zh|5=壬|1=Mizunoe (壬)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ren|13=User:Immanuelle/Mizunoe (壬)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ren|13=User:Immanuelle/Mizunoe (壬)|qq=}} represents yang It is the 59th combination in the Sexagenary cycle; the preceding one is {{ill|Xinyou|ja|1=Yin Metal Rooster|2=ja|辛酉|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Xinyou|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Xinyou|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Metal Rooster|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} and the following one is {{ill|Guihai|ja|1=Yin Water Pig|2=ja|癸亥|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Guihai|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Guihai|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Water Pig|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. Theory|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|qq=}}, the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Ten Heavenly Stems]]’ {{ill|Ren|ja|壬|1=Mizunoe ==Pronunciation== * English: Yang Water Dog (壬戌) ** Chinese (Mandarin Pinyin): rénxū ** Cantonese (Jyutping): jam4 seot1 ** Japanese: ***Kunyomi 1: Mizunoe-inu ***Kunyomi 2: Jinsui-no-inu ***Onyomi 1: jinjitsu ** Korean (Revised Romanization, Hangul): im sul (임술) ** Vietnamese (Hán-Việt): Nhâm Tuất
<!-- == * Yang Water Dog (壬戌) ** Chinese (Mandarin Pinyin): rénxū ** Cantonese (Jyutping): jam4 zeoi3 ** Japanese: ***Kunyomi: みずのえいぬ (mizunoe-inu) ***Onyomi: じんかのいぬ (jinka-no-inu) ***Onyomi: じんじゅつ (jinjutsu) ** Korean (Revised Romanization): imsuk ** Vietnamese (Hán-Việt): Nhâm Tuất
--> ==Years of Yang Water Dog== A year in the [[:en:Common Era|Common Era]] that leaves a remainder of 2 when divided by 60 is a [[:en:Year|Year]] of Jinshitsu. {| class="wikitable" |+ '''Years of Jinshitsu''' |- ! ==Months of Yang Water Dog== In a Common Era year, if the final digit is 3 or 8 (that is, when the Ten Heavenly Stems are {{ill|Gui|ja|癸|1=Mizunoto (癸)|lt=Mizunoto (癸)|2=ja|3=癸|4=zh|5=癸|1=Mizunoto (癸)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Gui|13=User:Immanuelle/Mizunoto (癸)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Gui|13=User:Immanuelle/Mizunoto (癸)|qq=}} or {{ill|Bo|ja|戊|1=Tsuchinoe (戊)|lt=Tsuchinoe (戊)|2=ja|3=戊|4=zh|5=戊|1=Tsuchinoe (戊)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bo|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsuchinoe (戊)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bo|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsuchinoe (戊)|qq=}}), then [[:en:September|September]] becomes the [[:en:Month|Month]] of Jinshitsu. However, the term “month” here may refer either to the month of the {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} or to a seasonal month (from [[:en:Hanlu|Hanro]] until the day before [[:en:Lidong|Rittō]]) as applicable.
==Days of Yang Water Dog== === Day Selection === A day of Jinshitsu is one of the intercalary days from {{ill|Hassen|ja|八専|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hassen|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hassen|qq=}}. == See Also == * {{prefix|qq=}} * {{intitle|qq=}}

==Months of Yang Water Dog== In a Common Era year, if the final digit is 3 or 8 (that is, when the Ten Heavenly Stems are {{ill|Gui|ja|癸|1=Mizunoto (癸)|lt=Mizunoto (癸)|2=ja|3=癸|4=zh|5=癸|1=Mizunoto (癸)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Gui|13=User:Immanuelle/Mizunoto (癸)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Gui|13=User:Immanuelle/Mizunoto (癸)|qq=}} or {{ill|Bo|ja|戊|1=Tsuchinoe (戊)|lt=Tsuchinoe (戊)|2=ja|3=戊|4=zh|5=戊|1=Tsuchinoe (戊)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bo|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsuchinoe (戊)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bo|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsuchinoe (戊)|qq=}}), then [[:en:September|September]] becomes the [[:en:Month|Month]] of Jinshitsu. However, the term “month” here may refer either to the month of the {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} or to a seasonal month (from [[:en:Hanlu|Hanro]] until the day before [[:en:Lidong|Rittō]]) as applicable.
==Days of Yang Water Dog== === Day Selection === A day of Jinshitsu is one of the intercalary days from {{ill|Hassen|ja|八専|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hassen|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hassen|qq=}}. == See Also == * {{prefix|qq=}} * {{intitle|qq=}}

It is the 59th combination in the Sexagenary cycle; the preceding one is {{ill|Xinyou|ja|1=Yin Metal Rooster|2=ja|辛酉|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Xinyou|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Xinyou|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Metal Rooster|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} and the following one is {{ill|Guihai|ja|1=Yin Water Pig|2=ja|癸亥|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Guihai|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Guihai|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Water Pig|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. Theory|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|qq=}}, the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Ten Heavenly Stems]]’ {{ill|Ren|ja|壬|1=Mizunoe ==Months of Yang Water Dog== In a Common Era year, if the final digit is 3 or 8 (that is, when the Ten Heavenly Stems are {{ill|Gui|ja|癸|1=Mizunoto (癸)|lt=Mizunoto (癸)|2=ja|3=癸|4=zh|5=癸|1=Mizunoto (癸)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Gui|13=User:Immanuelle/Mizunoto (癸)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Gui|13=User:Immanuelle/Mizunoto (癸)|qq=}} or {{ill|Bo|ja|戊|1=Tsuchinoe (戊)|lt=Tsuchinoe (戊)|2=ja|3=戊|4=zh|5=戊|1=Tsuchinoe (戊)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bo|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsuchinoe (戊)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bo|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsuchinoe (戊)|qq=}}), then [[:en:September|September]] becomes the [[:en:Month|Month]] of Jinshitsu. However, the term “month” here may refer either to the month of the {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} or to a seasonal month (from [[:en:Hanlu|Hanro]] until the day before [[:en:Lidong|Rittō]]) as applicable.
==Days of Yang Water Dog== === Day Selection === A day of Jinshitsu is one of the intercalary days from {{ill|Hassen|ja|八専|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hassen|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hassen|qq=}}. == See Also == * {{prefix|qq=}} * {{intitle|qq=}}

<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[af:Waterhond (astrologie)]][[cdo:Ìng-sáe̤k]][[de:Wasser-Hund]][[hak:Ngìm-sut]][[ja:壬戌]][[ko:임술]][[vi:Nhâm Tuất]][[za:Nyaemzswt]][[zh-min-nan:Jîm-sut]][[zh-yue:壬戌]][[zh:壬戌]] {{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[d:Q904937]] Wikidata name: Yang Water Dog [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 10:28, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}} {{infobox Chinese|l=Yang Water Dog|kanji=壬戌|romaji=mizunoe inu|onyomi=jinjutsu|p=rénxū|w=jen-hsü|mi=ʐən³⁵ ɕy|y=jam4 seot1|j=jam4 seot1|ci=jɐm sœt̚|mc=ɲiɪm syt|oc-bs=ɲɨm ʔsuʔ|qq=}} {{Sexagenary cycle|qq=}} '''Yang Water Dog also known as Jinshitsu''' (壬戌) (みずのえいぬ、じんすいのいぬ、じんじゅつ) is one of the [[:en:Sexagenary cycle|Sexagenary cycle]].
It is the 59th combination in the Sexagenary cycle; the preceding one is {{ill|Xinyou|ja|1=Yin Metal Rooster|2=ja|辛酉|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Xinyou|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Xinyou|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Metal Rooster|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} and the following one is {{ill|Guihai|ja|1=Yin Water Pig|2=ja|癸亥|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Guihai|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Guihai|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Water Pig|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. In the system of {{ill|Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|ja|陰陽五行思想|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|lt=Yin-Yang Five Elements|lt_ja=陰陽五行|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|qq=}}, the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Ten Heavenly Stems]]’ {{ill|Ren|ja|壬|1=Mizunoe (壬)|lt=Mizunoe (壬)|2=ja|3=壬|4=zh|5=壬|1=Mizunoe (壬)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ren|13=User:Immanuelle/Mizunoe (壬)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ren|13=User:Immanuelle/Mizunoe (壬)|qq=}} represents yang ==Months of Yang Water Dog== In a Common Era year, if the final digit is 3 or 8 (that is, when the Ten Heavenly Stems are {{ill|Gui|ja|癸|1=Mizunoto (癸)|lt=Mizunoto (癸)|2=ja|3=癸|4=zh|5=癸|1=Mizunoto (癸)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Gui|13=User:Immanuelle/Mizunoto (癸)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Gui|13=User:Immanuelle/Mizunoto (癸)|qq=}} or {{ill|Bo|ja|戊|1=Tsuchinoe (戊)|lt=Tsuchinoe (戊)|2=ja|3=戊|4=zh|5=戊|1=Tsuchinoe (戊)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bo|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsuchinoe (戊)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bo|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsuchinoe (戊)|qq=}}), then [[:en:September|September]] becomes the [[:en:Month|Month]] of Jinshitsu. However, the term “month” here may refer either to the month of the {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} or to a seasonal month (from [[:en:Hanlu|Hanro]] until the day before [[:en:Lidong|Rittō]]) as applicable.

It is the 59th combination in the Sexagenary cycle; the preceding one is {{ill|Xinyou|ja|1=Yin Metal Rooster|2=ja|辛酉|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Xinyou|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Xinyou|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Metal Rooster|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} and the following one is {{ill|Guihai|ja|1=Yin Water Pig|2=ja|癸亥|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Guihai|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Guihai|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Water Pig|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. In the system of {{ill|Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|ja|陰陽五行思想|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|lt=Yin-Yang Five Elements|lt_ja=陰陽五行|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|qq=}}, the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Ten Heavenly Stems]]’ {{ill|Ren|ja|壬|1=Mizunoe ==Months of Yang Water Dog== In a Common Era year, if the final digit is 3 or 8 (that is, when the Ten Heavenly Stems are {{ill|Gui|ja|癸|1=Mizunoto (癸)|lt=Mizunoto (癸)|2=ja|3=癸|4=zh|5=癸|1=Mizunoto (癸)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Gui|13=User:Immanuelle/Mizunoto (癸)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Gui|13=User:Immanuelle/Mizunoto (癸)|qq=}} or {{ill|Bo|ja|戊|1=Tsuchinoe (戊)|lt=Tsuchinoe (戊)|2=ja|3=戊|4=zh|5=戊|1=Tsuchinoe (戊)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bo|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsuchinoe (戊)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bo|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsuchinoe (戊)|qq=}}), then [[:en:September|September]] becomes the [[:en:Month|Month]] of Jinshitsu. However, the term “month” here may refer either to the month of the {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} or to a seasonal month (from [[:en:Hanlu|Hanro]] until the day before [[:en:Lidong|Rittō]]) as applicable.
==Days of Yang Water Dog== === Day Selection === A day of Jinshitsu is one of the intercalary days from {{ill|Hassen|ja|八専|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hassen|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hassen|qq=}}. == See Also == * {{prefix|qq=}} * {{intitle|qq=}}

==Months of Yang Water Dog== In a Common Era year, if the final digit is 3 or 8 (that is, when the Ten Heavenly Stems are {{ill|Gui|ja|癸|1=Mizunoto (癸)|lt=Mizunoto (癸)|2=ja|3=癸|4=zh|5=癸|1=Mizunoto (癸)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Gui|13=User:Immanuelle/Mizunoto (癸)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Gui|13=User:Immanuelle/Mizunoto (癸)|qq=}} or {{ill|Bo|ja|戊|1=Tsuchinoe (戊)|lt=Tsuchinoe (戊)|2=ja|3=戊|4=zh|5=戊|1=Tsuchinoe (戊)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bo|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsuchinoe (戊)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bo|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsuchinoe (戊)|qq=}}), then [[:en:September|September]] becomes the [[:en:Month|Month]] of Jinshitsu. However, the term “month” here may refer either to the month of the {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} or to a seasonal month (from [[:en:Hanlu|Hanro]] until the day before [[:en:Lidong|Rittō]]) as applicable.
==Days of Yang Water Dog== === Day Selection === A day of Jinshitsu is one of the intercalary days from {{ill|Hassen|ja|八専|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hassen|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hassen|qq=}}. == See Also == * {{prefix|qq=}} * {{intitle|qq=}}

It is the 59th combination in the Sexagenary cycle; the preceding one is {{ill|Xinyou|ja|1=Yin Metal Rooster|2=ja|辛酉|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Xinyou|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Xinyou|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Metal Rooster|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} and the following one is {{ill|Guihai|ja|1=Yin Water Pig|2=ja|癸亥|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Guihai|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Guihai|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Water Pig|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. In the system of {{ill|Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|ja|陰陽五行思想|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|lt=Yin-Yang Five Elements|lt_ja=陰陽五行|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|qq=}}, the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Ten Heavenly Stems]]’ {{ill|Ren|ja|壬|1=Mizunoe (壬)|lt=Mizunoe (壬)|2=ja|3=壬|4=zh|5=壬|1=Mizunoe (壬)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ren|13=User:Immanuelle/Mizunoe (壬)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ren|13=User:Immanuelle/Mizunoe (壬)|qq=}} represents yang ==Months of Yang Water Dog== In a Common Era year, if the final digit is 3 or 8 (that is, when the Ten Heavenly Stems are {{ill|Gui|ja|癸|1=Mizunoto (癸)|lt=Mizunoto (癸)|2=ja|3=癸|4=zh|5=癸|1=Mizunoto (癸)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Gui|13=User:Immanuelle/Mizunoto (癸)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Gui|13=User:Immanuelle/Mizunoto (癸)|qq=}} or {{ill|Bo|ja|戊|1=Tsuchinoe (戊)|lt=Tsuchinoe (戊)|2=ja|3=戊|4=zh|5=戊|1=Tsuchinoe (戊)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bo|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsuchinoe (戊)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bo|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsuchinoe (戊)|qq=}}), then [[:en:September|September]] becomes the [[:en:Month|Month]] of Jinshitsu. However, the term “month” here may refer either to the month of the {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} or to a seasonal month (from [[:en:Hanlu|Hanro]] until the day before [[:en:Lidong|Rittō]]) as applicable.
==Days of Yang Water Dog== === Day Selection === A day of Jinshitsu is one of the intercalary days from {{ill|Hassen|ja|八専|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hassen|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hassen|qq=}}. == See Also == * {{prefix|qq=}} * {{intitle|qq=}}

==Months of Yang Water Dog== In a Common Era year, if the final digit is 3 or 8 (that is, when the Ten Heavenly Stems are {{ill|Gui|ja|癸|1=Mizunoto (癸)|lt=Mizunoto (癸)|2=ja|3=癸|4=zh|5=癸|1=Mizunoto (癸)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Gui|13=User:Immanuelle/Mizunoto (癸)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Gui|13=User:Immanuelle/Mizunoto (癸)|qq=}} or {{ill|Bo|ja|戊|1=Tsuchinoe (戊)|lt=Tsuchinoe (戊)|2=ja|3=戊|4=zh|5=戊|1=Tsuchinoe (戊)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bo|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsuchinoe (戊)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bo|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsuchinoe (戊)|qq=}}), then [[:en:September|September]] becomes the [[:en:Month|Month]] of Jinshitsu. However, the term “month” here may refer either to the month of the {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} or to a seasonal month (from [[:en:Hanlu|Hanro]] until the day before [[:en:Lidong|Rittō]]) as applicable.
==Days of Yang Water Dog== === Day Selection === A day of Jinshitsu is one of the intercalary days from {{ill|Hassen|ja|八専|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hassen|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hassen|qq=}}. == See Also == * {{prefix|qq=}} * {{intitle|qq=}}

It is the 59th combination in the Sexagenary cycle; the preceding one is {{ill|Xinyou|ja|1=Yin Metal Rooster|2=ja|辛酉|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Xinyou|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Xinyou|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Metal Rooster|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} and the following one is {{ill|Guihai|ja|1=Yin Water Pig|2=ja|癸亥|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Guihai|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Guihai|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Water Pig|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. Theory|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|qq=}}, the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Ten Heavenly Stems]]’ {{ill|Ren|ja|壬|1=Mizunoe ==Months of Yang Water Dog== In a Common Era year, if the final digit is 3 or 8 (that is, when the Ten Heavenly Stems are {{ill|Gui|ja|癸|1=Mizunoto (癸)|lt=Mizunoto (癸)|2=ja|3=癸|4=zh|5=癸|1=Mizunoto (癸)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Gui|13=User:Immanuelle/Mizunoto (癸)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Gui|13=User:Immanuelle/Mizunoto (癸)|qq=}} or {{ill|Bo|ja|戊|1=Tsuchinoe (戊)|lt=Tsuchinoe (戊)|2=ja|3=戊|4=zh|5=戊|1=Tsuchinoe (戊)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bo|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsuchinoe (戊)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bo|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsuchinoe (戊)|qq=}}), then [[:en:September|September]] becomes the [[:en:Month|Month]] of Jinshitsu. However, the term “month” here may refer either to the month of the {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} or to a seasonal month (from [[:en:Hanlu|Hanro]] until the day before [[:en:Lidong|Rittō]]) as applicable.

It is the 59th combination in the Sexagenary cycle; the preceding one is {{ill|Xinyou|ja|1=Yin Metal Rooster|2=ja|辛酉|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Xinyou|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Xinyou|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Metal Rooster|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} and the following one is {{ill|Guihai|ja|1=Yin Water Pig|2=ja|癸亥|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Guihai|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Guihai|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Water Pig|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. In the system of {{ill|Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|ja|陰陽五行思想|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|lt=Yin-Yang Five Elements|lt_ja=陰陽五行|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|qq=}}, the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Ten Heavenly Stems]]’ {{ill|Ren|ja|壬|1=Mizunoe ==Months of Yang Water Dog== In a Common Era year, if the final digit is 3 or 8 (that is, when the Ten Heavenly Stems are {{ill|Gui|ja|癸|1=Mizunoto (癸)|lt=Mizunoto (癸)|2=ja|3=癸|4=zh|5=癸|1=Mizunoto (癸)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Gui|13=User:Immanuelle/Mizunoto (癸)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Gui|13=User:Immanuelle/Mizunoto (癸)|qq=}} or {{ill|Bo|ja|戊|1=Tsuchinoe (戊)|lt=Tsuchinoe (戊)|2=ja|3=戊|4=zh|5=戊|1=Tsuchinoe (戊)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bo|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsuchinoe (戊)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bo|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsuchinoe (戊)|qq=}}), then [[:en:September|September]] becomes the [[:en:Month|Month]] of Jinshitsu. However, the term “month” here may refer either to the month of the {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} or to a seasonal month (from [[:en:Hanlu|Hanro]] until the day before [[:en:Lidong|Rittō]]) as applicable.
==Days of Yang Water Dog== === Day Selection === A day of Jinshitsu is one of the intercalary days from {{ill|Hassen|ja|八専|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hassen|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hassen|qq=}}. == See Also == * {{prefix|qq=}} * {{intitle|qq=}}

==Months of Yang Water Dog== In a Common Era year, if the final digit is 3 or 8 (that is, when the Ten Heavenly Stems are {{ill|Gui|ja|癸|1=Mizunoto (癸)|lt=Mizunoto (癸)|2=ja|3=癸|4=zh|5=癸|1=Mizunoto (癸)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Gui|13=User:Immanuelle/Mizunoto (癸)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Gui|13=User:Immanuelle/Mizunoto (癸)|qq=}} or {{ill|Bo|ja|戊|1=Tsuchinoe (戊)|lt=Tsuchinoe (戊)|2=ja|3=戊|4=zh|5=戊|1=Tsuchinoe (戊)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bo|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsuchinoe (戊)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bo|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsuchinoe (戊)|qq=}}), then [[:en:September|September]] becomes the [[:en:Month|Month]] of Jinshitsu. However, the term “month” here may refer either to the month of the {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} or to a seasonal month (from [[:en:Hanlu|Hanro]] until the day before [[:en:Lidong|Rittō]]) as applicable.
==Days of Yang Water Dog== === Day Selection === A day of Jinshitsu is one of the intercalary days from {{ill|Hassen|ja|八専|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hassen|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hassen|qq=}}. == See Also == * {{prefix|qq=}} * {{intitle|qq=}}
