It is the 59th combination in the Sexagenary cycle; the preceding one is {{ill|Xinyou|ja|1=Yin Metal Rooster|2=ja|辛酉|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Xinyou|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Xinyou|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Metal Rooster|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} and the following one is {{ill|Guihai|ja|1=Yin Water Pig|2=ja|癸亥|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Guihai|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Guihai|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Water Pig|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. In the system of {{ill|Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|ja|陰陽五行思想|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|lt=Yin-Yang Five Elements|lt_ja=陰陽五行|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|qq=}}, the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Ten Heavenly Stems]]’ {{ill|Ren|ja|壬|1=Mizunoe (壬)|lt=Mizunoe (壬)|2=ja|3=壬|4=zh|5=壬|1=Mizunoe (壬)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ren|13=User:Immanuelle/Mizunoe (壬)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ren|13=User:Immanuelle/Mizunoe (壬)|qq=}} represents yang ==Months of Yang Water Dog== In a Common Era year, if the final digit is 3 or 8 (that is, when the Ten Heavenly Stems are {{ill|Gui|ja|癸|1=Mizunoto (癸)|lt=Mizunoto (癸)|2=ja|3=癸|4=zh|5=癸|1=Mizunoto (癸)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Gui|13=User:Immanuelle/Mizunoto (癸)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Gui|13=User:Immanuelle/Mizunoto (癸)|qq=}} or {{ill|Bo|ja|戊|1=Tsuchinoe (戊)|lt=Tsuchinoe (戊)|2=ja|3=戊|4=zh|5=戊|1=Tsuchinoe (戊)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bo|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsuchinoe (戊)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bo|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsuchinoe (戊)|qq=}}), then [[:en:September|September]] becomes the [[:en:Month|Month]] of Jinshitsu. However, the term “month” here may refer either to the month of the {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} or to a seasonal month (from [[:en:Hanlu|Hanro]] until the day before [[:en:Lidong|Rittō]]) as applicable.

==Months of Yang Water Dog== In a Common Era year, if the final digit is 3 or 8 (that is, when the Ten Heavenly Stems are {{ill|Gui|ja|癸|1=Mizunoto (癸)|lt=Mizunoto (癸)|2=ja|3=癸|4=zh|5=癸|1=Mizunoto (癸)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Gui|13=User:Immanuelle/Mizunoto (癸)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Gui|13=User:Immanuelle/Mizunoto (癸)|qq=}} or {{ill|Bo|ja|戊|1=Tsuchinoe (戊)|lt=Tsuchinoe (戊)|2=ja|3=戊|4=zh|5=戊|1=Tsuchinoe (戊)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bo|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsuchinoe (戊)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bo|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsuchinoe (戊)|qq=}}), then [[:en:September|September]] becomes the [[:en:Month|Month]] of Jinshitsu. However, the term “month” here may refer either to the month of the {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} or to a seasonal month (from [[:en:Hanlu|Hanro]] until the day before [[:en:Lidong|Rittō]]) as applicable.
==Days of Yang Water Dog== === Day Selection === A day of Jinshitsu is one of the intercalary days from {{ill|Hassen|ja|八専|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hassen|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hassen|qq=}}. == See Also == * {{prefix|qq=}} * {{intitle|qq=}}

{{infobox Chinese|l=Yang Water Dog|kanji=壬戌|romaji=mizunoe inu|onyomi=jinjutsu|p=rénxū|w=jen-hsü|mi=ʐən³⁵ ɕy|y=jam4 seot1|j=jam4 seot1|ci=jɐm sœt̚|mc=ɲiɪm syt|oc-bs=ɲɨm ʔsuʔ|qq=}}
{{Sexagenary cycle|qq=}}
'''Yang Water Dog also known as  Jinshitsu''' (壬戌) (みずのえいぬ、じんすいのいぬ、じんじゅつ) is one of the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|en|Sexagenary cycle|WD=Q246658|lt=Sexagenary cycle}}.

It is the 59th combination in the Sexagenary cycle; the preceding one is {{ill|Xinyou|ja|1=Yin Metal Rooster|2=ja|辛酉|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Xinyou|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Xinyou|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Metal Rooster|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} and the following one is {{ill|Guihai|ja|1=Yin Water Pig|2=ja|癸亥|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Guihai|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Guihai|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Water Pig|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. In the system of {{ill|Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|ja|陰陽五行思想|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|lt=Yin-Yang Five Elements|lt_ja=陰陽五行|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|qq=}}, the {{ill|Heavenly Stems|en|Heavenly Stems|WD=Q1190985|lt=Ten Heavenly Stems}}’ {{ill|Ren|ja|壬|1=Mizunoe (壬)|lt=Mizunoe (壬)|2=ja|3=壬|4=zh|5=壬|1=Mizunoe (壬)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ren|13=User:Immanuelle/Mizunoe (壬)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ren|13=User:Immanuelle/Mizunoe (壬)|qq=}} represents yang {{ill|Water|zh|Water (水)|comment=doing this to prevent wrong interwiki linking by bot|1=Water (wuxing)|lt=Water (水)|comment=doing this to prevent wrong interwiki linking by ==Pronunciation==
* English: Yang Water Dog (壬戌)
** Chinese (Mandarin Pinyin): rénxū
** Cantonese (Jyutping): jam4 seot1
**  Japanese:
***Kunyomi 1: Mizunoe-inu
***Kunyomi 2: Jinsui-no-inu
***Onyomi 1: jinjitsu
** Korean (Revised Romanization, Hangul): im sul (임술)
** Vietnamese (Hán-Việt): Nhâm Tuất

==Months of Yang Water Dog==
In a Common Era year, if the final digit is 3 or 8 (that is, when the Ten Heavenly Stems are {{ill|Gui|ja|癸|1=Mizunoto (癸)|lt=Mizunoto (癸)|2=ja|3=癸|4=zh|5=癸|1=Mizunoto (癸)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Gui|13=User:Immanuelle/Mizunoto (癸)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Gui|13=User:Immanuelle/Mizunoto (癸)|qq=}} or {{ill|Bo|ja|戊|1=Tsuchinoe (戊)|lt=Tsuchinoe (戊)|2=ja|3=戊|4=zh|5=戊|1=Tsuchinoe (戊)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bo|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsuchinoe (戊)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bo|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsuchinoe (戊)|qq=}}), then {{ill|September|en|September|WD=Q123|lt=September}} becomes the {{ill|Month|en|Month|WD=Q5151|lt=Month}} of Jinshitsu. However, the term “month” here may refer either to the month of the {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} or to a seasonal month (from {{ill|Hanlu|en|Hanlu|WD=Q1193124|lt=Hanro}} until the day before {{ill|Lidong|en|Lidong|WD=Q1191018|lt=Rittō}}) as applicable.

==Days of Yang Water Dog==
=== Day Selection ===
A day of Jinshitsu is one of the intercalary days from {{ill|Hassen|ja|八専|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hassen|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hassen|qq=}}.

{{Sexagenary cycle|qq=}}
'''Yang Water Dog also known as  Jinshitsu''' (壬戌) (みずのえいぬ、じんすいのいぬ、じんじゅつ) is one of the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|en|Sexagenary cycle|WD=Q246658|lt=Sexagenary cycle}}.

It is the 59th combination in the Sexagenary cycle; the preceding one is {{ill|Xinyou|ja|1=Yin Metal Rooster|2=ja|辛酉|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Xinyou|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Xinyou|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Metal Rooster|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} and the following one is {{ill|Guihai|ja|1=Yin Water Pig|2=ja|癸亥|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Guihai|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Guihai|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Water Pig|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. In the system of {{ill|Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|ja|陰陽五行思想|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|lt=Yin-Yang Five Elements|lt_ja=陰陽五行|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|qq=}}, the {{ill|Heavenly Stems|en|Heavenly Stems|WD=Q1190985|lt=Ten Heavenly Stems}}’ {{ill|Ren|ja|壬|1=Mizunoe (壬)|lt=Mizunoe (壬)|2=ja|3=壬|4=zh|5=壬|1=Mizunoe (壬)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ren|13=User:Immanuelle/Mizunoe (壬)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ren|13=User:Immanuelle/Mizunoe ==Pronunciation==
* English: Yang Water Dog (壬戌)

** Cantonese (Jyutping): jam4 seot1
**  Japanese:

***Kunyomi 2: Jinsui-no-inu
***Onyomi 1: jinjitsu
** Korean (Revised Romanization, Hangul): im sul (임술)
** Vietnamese (Hán-Việt): Nhâm Tuất

==Months of Yang Water Dog==
In a Common Era year, if the final digit is 3 or 8 (that is, when the Ten Heavenly Stems are {{ill|Gui|ja|癸|1=Mizunoto (癸)|lt=Mizunoto (癸)|2=ja|3=癸|4=zh|5=癸|1=Mizunoto (癸)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Gui|13=User:Immanuelle/Mizunoto (癸)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Gui|13=User:Immanuelle/Mizunoto (癸)|qq=}} or {{ill|Bo|ja|戊|1=Tsuchinoe (戊)|lt=Tsuchinoe (戊)|2=ja|3=戊|4=zh|5=戊|1=Tsuchinoe (戊)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bo|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsuchinoe (戊)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bo|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsuchinoe (戊)|qq=}}), then {{ill|September|en|September|WD=Q123|lt=September}} becomes the {{ill|Month|en|Month|WD=Q5151|lt=Month}} of Jinshitsu. However, the term “month” here may refer either to the month of the {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} or to a seasonal month (from {{ill|Hanlu|en|Hanlu|WD=Q1193124|lt=Hanro}} until the day before {{ill|Lidong|en|Lidong|WD=Q1191018|lt=Rittō}}) as applicable.

==Days of Yang Water Dog==
=== Day Selection ===
A day of Jinshitsu is one of the intercalary days from {{ill|Hassen|ja|八専|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hassen|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hassen|qq=}}.

'''Yang Water Dog also known as  Jinshitsu''' (壬戌) (みずのえいぬ、じんすいのいぬ、じんじゅつ) is one of the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|en|Sexagenary cycle|WD=Q246658|lt=Sexagenary cycle}}.

It is the 59th combination in the Sexagenary cycle; the preceding one is {{ill|Xinyou|ja|1=Yin Metal Rooster|2=ja|辛酉|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Xinyou|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Xinyou|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Metal Rooster|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} and the following one is {{ill|Guihai|ja|1=Yin Water Pig|2=ja|癸亥|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Guihai|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Guihai|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Water Pig|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. ==Months of Yang Water Dog==
In a Common Era year, if the final digit is 3 or 8 (that is, when the Ten Heavenly Stems are {{ill|Gui|ja|癸|1=Mizunoto (癸)|lt=Mizunoto (癸)|2=ja|3=癸|4=zh|5=癸|1=Mizunoto (癸)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Gui|13=User:Immanuelle/Mizunoto (癸)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Gui|13=User:Immanuelle/Mizunoto (癸)|qq=}} or {{ill|Bo|ja|戊|1=Tsuchinoe (戊)|lt=Tsuchinoe (戊)|2=ja|3=戊|4=zh|5=戊|1=Tsuchinoe (戊)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bo|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsuchinoe (戊)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bo|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsuchinoe (戊)|qq=}}), then {{ill|September|en|September|WD=Q123|lt=September}} becomes the {{ill|Month|en|Month|WD=Q5151|lt=Month}} of Jinshitsu. However, the term “month” here may refer either to the month of the {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} or to a seasonal month (from {{ill|Hanlu|en|Hanlu|WD=Q1193124|lt=Hanro}} until the day before {{ill|Lidong|en|Lidong|WD=Q1191018|lt=Rittō}}) as applicable.

==Days of Yang Water Dog==
=== Day Selection ===
A day of Jinshitsu is one of the intercalary days from {{ill|Hassen|ja|八専|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hassen|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hassen|qq=}}.

{{infobox Chinese|l=Yang Water Dog|kanji=壬戌|romaji=mizunoe inu|onyomi=jinjutsu|p=rénxū|w=jen-hsü|mi=ʐən³⁵ ɕy|y=jam4 seot1|j=jam4 seot1|ci=jɐm sœt̚|mc=ɲiɪm syt|oc-bs=ɲɨm ʔsuʔ|qq=}}
{{Sexagenary cycle|qq=}}
'''Yang Water Dog also known as  Jinshitsu''' (壬戌) (みずのえいぬ、じんすいのいぬ、じんじゅつ) is one of the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|en|Sexagenary cycle|WD=Q246658|lt=Sexagenary cycle}}.

It is the 59th combination in the Sexagenary cycle; the preceding one is {{ill|Xinyou|ja|1=Yin Metal Rooster|2=ja|辛酉|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Xinyou|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Xinyou|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Metal Rooster|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} and the following one is {{ill|Guihai|ja|1=Yin Water Pig|2=ja|癸亥|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Guihai|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Guihai|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Water Pig|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. In the system of {{ill|Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|ja|陰陽五行思想|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|lt=Yin-Yang Five Elements|lt_ja=陰陽五行|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|qq=}}, the {{ill|Heavenly Stems|en|Heavenly Stems|WD=Q1190985|lt=Ten Heavenly Stems}}’ {{ill|Ren|ja|壬|1=Mizunoe (壬)|lt=Mizunoe (壬)|2=ja|3=壬|4=zh|5=壬|1=Mizunoe (壬)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ren|13=User:Immanuelle/Mizunoe (壬)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ren|13=User:Immanuelle/Mizunoe (壬)|qq=}} represents yang {{ill|Water|zh|Water (水)|comment=doing this to prevent wrong interwiki linking by bot|1=Water (wuxing)|lt=Water (水)|comment=doing this to prevent wrong interwiki linking by bot|1=Water (wuxing)|2=uk|3=Вода (У-сін)|4=als|5=Wasser in dr chinesische Fümf-Elemänt-Leer|6=bcl|7=Tubig (wuxing)|8=vi|9=Thủy (Ngũ hành)|10=pt|11=Água (astrologia)|lt=Water (水)|2=uk|3=Вода ==Pronunciation==
* English: Yang Water Dog (壬戌)
** Chinese (Mandarin Pinyin): rénxū
** Cantonese (Jyutping): jam4 seot1
**  Japanese:
***Kunyomi 1: Mizunoe-inu
***Kunyomi 2: Jinsui-no-inu
***Onyomi 1: jinjitsu
** Korean (Revised Romanization, Hangul): im sul (임술)
** Vietnamese (Hán-Việt): Nhâm Tuất

==Years of Yang Water Dog==

==Months of Yang Water Dog==
In a Common Era year, if the final digit is 3 or 8 (that is, when the Ten Heavenly Stems are {{ill|Gui|ja|癸|1=Mizunoto (癸)|lt=Mizunoto (癸)|2=ja|3=癸|4=zh|5=癸|1=Mizunoto (癸)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Gui|13=User:Immanuelle/Mizunoto (癸)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Gui|13=User:Immanuelle/Mizunoto (癸)|qq=}} or {{ill|Bo|ja|戊|1=Tsuchinoe (戊)|lt=Tsuchinoe (戊)|2=ja|3=戊|4=zh|5=戊|1=Tsuchinoe (戊)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bo|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsuchinoe (戊)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bo|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsuchinoe (戊)|qq=}}), then {{ill|September|en|September|WD=Q123|lt=September}} becomes the {{ill|Month|en|Month|WD=Q5151|lt=Month}} of Jinshitsu. However, the term “month” here may refer either to the month of the {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} or to a seasonal month (from {{ill|Hanlu|en|Hanlu|WD=Q1193124|lt=Hanro}} until the day before {{ill|Lidong|en|Lidong|WD=Q1191018|lt=Rittō}}) as applicable.

==Days of Yang Water Dog==
=== Day Selection ===
A day of Jinshitsu is one of the intercalary days from {{ill|Hassen|ja|八専|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hassen|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hassen|qq=}}.

{{infobox Chinese|l=Yang Water Dog|kanji=壬戌|romaji=mizunoe inu|onyomi=jinjutsu|p=rénxū|w=jen-hsü|mi=ʐən³⁵ ɕy|y=jam4 seot1|j=jam4 seot1|ci=jɐm sœt̚|mc=ɲiɪm syt|oc-bs=ɲɨm ʔsuʔ|qq=}}
{{Sexagenary cycle|qq=}}
'''Yang Water Dog also known as  Jinshitsu''' (壬戌) (みずのえいぬ、じんすいのいぬ、じんじゅつ) is one of the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|en|Sexagenary cycle|WD=Q246658|lt=Sexagenary cycle}}.

It is the 59th combination in the Sexagenary cycle; the preceding one is {{ill|Xinyou|ja|1=Yin Metal Rooster|2=ja|辛酉|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Xinyou|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Xinyou|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Metal Rooster|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} and the following one is {{ill|Guihai|ja|1=Yin Water Pig|2=ja|癸亥|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Guihai|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Guihai|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Water Pig|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. In the system of {{ill|Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|ja|陰陽五行思想|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|lt=Yin-Yang Five Elements|lt_ja=陰陽五行|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|qq=}}, the {{ill|Heavenly Stems|en|Heavenly Stems|WD=Q1190985|lt=Ten Heavenly Stems}}’ {{ill|Ren|ja|壬|1=Mizunoe (壬)|lt=Mizunoe (壬)|2=ja|3=壬|4=zh|5=壬|1=Mizunoe (壬)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ren|13=User:Immanuelle/Mizunoe (壬)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ren|13=User:Immanuelle/Mizunoe ==Months of Yang Water Dog==
In a Common Era year, if the final digit is 3 or 8 (that is, when the Ten Heavenly Stems are {{ill|Gui|ja|癸|1=Mizunoto (癸)|lt=Mizunoto (癸)|2=ja|3=癸|4=zh|5=癸|1=Mizunoto (癸)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Gui|13=User:Immanuelle/Mizunoto (癸)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Gui|13=User:Immanuelle/Mizunoto (癸)|qq=}} or {{ill|Bo|ja|戊|1=Tsuchinoe (戊)|lt=Tsuchinoe (戊)|2=ja|3=戊|4=zh|5=戊|1=Tsuchinoe (戊)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bo|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsuchinoe (戊)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bo|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsuchinoe (戊)|qq=}}), then {{ill|September|en|September|WD=Q123|lt=September}} becomes the {{ill|Month|en|Month|WD=Q5151|lt=Month}} of Jinshitsu. However, the term “month” here may refer either to the month of the {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} or to a seasonal month (from {{ill|Hanlu|en|Hanlu|WD=Q1193124|lt=Hanro}} until the day before {{ill|Lidong|en|Lidong|WD=Q1191018|lt=Rittō}}) as applicable.

==Days of Yang Water Dog==
=== Day Selection ===
A day of Jinshitsu is one of the intercalary days from {{ill|Hassen|ja|八専|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hassen|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hassen|qq=}}.

{{Sexagenary cycle|qq=}}
'''Yang Water Dog also known as  Jinshitsu''' (壬戌) (みずのえいぬ、じんすいのいぬ、じんじゅつ) is one of the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|en|Sexagenary cycle|WD=Q246658|lt=Sexagenary cycle|1=Sexagenary cycle}}.

It is the 59th combination in the Sexagenary cycle; the preceding one is {{ill|Xinyou|ja|1=Yin Metal Rooster|2=ja|辛酉|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Xinyou|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Xinyou|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Metal Rooster|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} and the following one is {{ill|Guihai|ja|1=Yin Water Pig|2=ja|癸亥|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Guihai|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Guihai|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Water Pig|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. In the system of {{ill|Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|ja|陰陽五行思想|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|lt=Yin-Yang Five Elements|lt_ja=陰陽五行|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing ==Months of Yang Water Dog==
In a Common Era year, if the final digit is 3 or 8 (that is, when the Ten Heavenly Stems are {{ill|Gui|ja|癸|1=Mizunoto (癸)|lt=Mizunoto (癸)|2=ja|3=癸|4=zh|5=癸|1=Mizunoto (癸)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Gui|13=User:Immanuelle/Mizunoto (癸)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Gui|13=User:Immanuelle/Mizunoto (癸)|qq=}} or {{ill|Bo|ja|戊|1=Tsuchinoe (戊)|lt=Tsuchinoe (戊)|2=ja|3=戊|4=zh|5=戊|1=Tsuchinoe (戊)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bo|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsuchinoe (戊)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bo|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsuchinoe (戊)|qq=}}), then {{ill|September|en|September|WD=Q123|lt=September|1=September}} becomes the {{ill|Month|en|Month|WD=Q5151|lt=Month|1=Month}} of Jinshitsu. However, the term “month” here may refer either to the month of the {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} or to a seasonal month (from {{ill|Hanlu|en|Hanlu|WD=Q1193124|lt=Hanro|1=Hanlu}} until the day before {{ill|Lidong|en|Lidong|WD=Q1191018|lt=Rittō|1=Lidong}}) as applicable.

==Days of Yang Water Dog==
=== Day Selection ===
A day of Jinshitsu is one of the intercalary days from {{ill|Hassen|ja|八専|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hassen|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hassen|qq=}}.

'''Yang Water Dog also known as  Jinshitsu''' (壬戌) (みずのえいぬ、じんすいのいぬ、じんじゅつ) is one of the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|en|Sexagenary cycle|WD=Q246658|lt=Sexagenary cycle|1=Sexagenary cycle}}.

It is the 59th combination in the Sexagenary cycle; the preceding one is {{ill|Xinyou|ja|1=Yin Metal Rooster|2=ja|辛酉|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Xinyou|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Xinyou|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Metal Rooster|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} and the following one is {{ill|Guihai|ja|1=Yin Water Pig|2=ja|癸亥|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Guihai|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Guihai|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Water Pig|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. In the system of {{ill|Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|ja|陰陽五行思想|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|lt=Yin-Yang Five Elements|lt_ja=陰陽五行|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Stems|1=Heavenly Stems}}’ {{ill|Ren|ja|壬|1=Mizunoe (壬)|lt=Mizunoe (壬)|2=ja|3=壬|4=zh|5=壬|1=Mizunoe (壬)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ren|13=User:Immanuelle/Mizunoe ==Months of Yang Water Dog==
In a Common Era year, if the final digit is 3 or 8 (that is, when the Ten Heavenly Stems are {{ill|Gui|ja|癸|1=Mizunoto (癸)|lt=Mizunoto (癸)|2=ja|3=癸|4=zh|5=癸|1=Mizunoto (癸)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Gui|13=User:Immanuelle/Mizunoto (癸)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Gui|13=User:Immanuelle/Mizunoto (癸)|qq=}} or {{ill|Bo|ja|戊|1=Tsuchinoe (戊)|lt=Tsuchinoe (戊)|2=ja|3=戊|4=zh|5=戊|1=Tsuchinoe (戊)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bo|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsuchinoe (戊)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bo|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsuchinoe (戊)|qq=}}), then {{ill|September|en|September|WD=Q123|lt=September|1=September}} becomes the {{ill|Month|en|Month|WD=Q5151|lt=Month|1=Month}} of Jinshitsu. However, the term “month” here may refer either to the month of the {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} or to a seasonal month (from {{ill|Hanlu|en|Hanlu|WD=Q1193124|lt=Hanro|1=Hanlu}} until the day before {{ill|Lidong|en|Lidong|WD=Q1191018|lt=Rittō|1=Lidong}}) as applicable.

==Days of Yang Water Dog==
=== Day Selection ===
A day of Jinshitsu is one of the intercalary days from {{ill|Hassen|ja|八専|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hassen|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hassen|qq=}}.

'''Yang Water Dog also known as  Jinshitsu''' (壬戌) (みずのえいぬ、じんすいのいぬ、じんじゅつ) is one of the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|en|Sexagenary cycle|WD=Q246658|lt=Sexagenary cycle|1=Sexagenary cycle}}.

It is the 59th combination in the Sexagenary cycle; the preceding one is {{ill|Xinyou|ja|1=Yin Metal Rooster|2=ja|辛酉|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Xinyou|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Xinyou|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Metal Rooster|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} and the following one is {{ill|Guihai|ja|1=Yin Water Pig|2=ja|癸亥|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Guihai|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Guihai|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Water Pig|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. In the system of {{ill|Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|ja|陰陽五行思想|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|lt=Yin-Yang Five Elements|lt_ja=陰陽五行|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Stems|1=Heavenly Stems}}’ {{ill|Ren|ja|壬|1=Mizunoe (壬)|lt=Mizunoe (壬)|2=ja|3=壬|4=zh|5=壬|1=Mizunoe (壬)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ren|13=User:Immanuelle/Mizunoe ==Months of Yang Water Dog==
In a Common Era year, if the final digit is 3 or 8 (that is, when the Ten Heavenly Stems are {{ill|Gui|ja|癸|1=Mizunoto (癸)|lt=Mizunoto (癸)|2=ja|3=癸|4=zh|5=癸|1=Mizunoto (癸)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Gui|13=User:Immanuelle/Mizunoto (癸)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Gui|13=User:Immanuelle/Mizunoto (癸)|qq=}} or {{ill|Bo|ja|戊|1=Tsuchinoe (戊)|lt=Tsuchinoe (戊)|2=ja|3=戊|4=zh|5=戊|1=Tsuchinoe (戊)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bo|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsuchinoe (戊)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bo|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsuchinoe (戊)|qq=}}), then {{ill|September|en|September|WD=Q123|lt=September|1=September}} becomes the {{ill|Month|en|Month|WD=Q5151|lt=Month|1=Month}} of Jinshitsu. However, the term “month” here may refer either to the month of the {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} or to a seasonal month (from {{ill|Hanlu|en|Hanlu|WD=Q1193124|lt=Hanro|1=Hanlu}} until the day before {{ill|Lidong|en|Lidong|WD=Q1191018|lt=Rittō|1=Lidong}}) as applicable.

==Days of Yang Water Dog==
=== Day Selection ===
A day of Jinshitsu is one of the intercalary days from {{ill|Hassen|ja|八専|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hassen|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hassen|qq=}}.

{{Sexagenary cycle|qq=}}
'''Yang Water Dog also known as  Jinshitsu''' (壬戌) (みずのえいぬ、じんすいのいぬ、じんじゅつ) is one of the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|en|Sexagenary cycle|WD=Q246658|lt=Sexagenary cycle|1=Sexagenary cycle}}.

It is the 59th combination in the Sexagenary cycle; the preceding one is {{ill|Xinyou|ja|1=Yin Metal Rooster|2=ja|辛酉|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Xinyou|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Xinyou|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Metal Rooster|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} and the following one is {{ill|Guihai|ja|1=Yin Water Pig|2=ja|癸亥|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Guihai|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Guihai|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Water Pig|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. In the system of {{ill|Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|ja|陰陽五行思想|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|lt=Yin-Yang Five Elements|lt_ja=陰陽五行|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|qq=}}, the {{ill|Heavenly Stems|en|Heavenly Stems|WD=Q1190985|lt=Ten Heavenly Stems|1=Heavenly Stems}}’ {{ill|Ren|ja|壬|1=Mizunoe (壬)|lt=Mizunoe (壬)|2=ja|3=壬|4=zh|5=壬|1=Mizunoe (壬)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ren|13=User:Immanuelle/Mizunoe (壬)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ren|13=User:Immanuelle/Mizunoe (壬)|qq=}} represents yang {{ill|Water|zh|Water (水)|comment=doing this to prevent wrong interwiki linking by bot|1=Water (wuxing)|lt=Water (水)|comment=doing this to prevent wrong interwiki linking by bot|1=Water (wuxing)|2=uk|3=Вода (У-сін)|4=als|5=Wasser in dr chinesische Fümf-Elemänt-Leer|6=bcl|7=Tubig ==Months of Yang Water Dog==
In a Common Era year, if the final digit is 3 or 8 (that is, when the Ten Heavenly Stems are {{ill|Gui|ja|癸|1=Mizunoto (癸)|lt=Mizunoto (癸)|2=ja|3=癸|4=zh|5=癸|1=Mizunoto (癸)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Gui|13=User:Immanuelle/Mizunoto (癸)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Gui|13=User:Immanuelle/Mizunoto (癸)|qq=}} or {{ill|Bo|ja|戊|1=Tsuchinoe (戊)|lt=Tsuchinoe (戊)|2=ja|3=戊|4=zh|5=戊|1=Tsuchinoe (戊)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bo|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsuchinoe (戊)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bo|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsuchinoe (戊)|qq=}}), then {{ill|September|en|September|WD=Q123|lt=September|1=September}} becomes the {{ill|Month|en|Month|WD=Q5151|lt=Month|1=Month}} of Jinshitsu. However, the term “month” here may refer either to the month of the {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} or to a seasonal month (from {{ill|Hanlu|en|Hanlu|WD=Q1193124|lt=Hanro|1=Hanlu}} until the day before {{ill|Lidong|en|Lidong|WD=Q1191018|lt=Rittō|1=Lidong}}) as applicable.

==Days of Yang Water Dog==
=== Day Selection ===
A day of Jinshitsu is one of the intercalary days from {{ill|Hassen|ja|八専|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hassen|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hassen|qq=}}.
